SELECT l.LOT_NAME                     "lotName",
           l.PRODUCT_TYPE                 "productType",
           l.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME             "productDefName",
           l.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION          "productDefVersion",
           l.WORK_ORDER_NAME              "workOrderName",
           l.ORIGINAL_LOT_NAME            "originalLotName",
           l.PARENT_LOT_NAME              "parentLotName",
           l.SOURCE_LOT_NAME              "sourceLotName",
           l.TARGET_LOT_NAME              "targetLotName",
           l.LOT_TYPE                     "lotType",
           l.DUE_DATE                     "dueDate",
           l.LOT_PRIORITY                 "lotPriority",
           l.LOT_STATE                    "lotState",
           l.PRODUCT_QUANTITY             "productQuantity",
           l.LOT_PROCESS_STATE            "lotProcessState",
           l.EQUIPMENT_NAME               "equipmentName",
           l.EQUIPMENT_RECIPE_NAME        "equipmentRecipeName",
           l.LOT_HOLD_STATE               "lotHoldState",
           l.LOT_HOLD_COUNT               "lotHoldCount",
           l.REASON_CODE                  "reasonCode",
           l.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME     "mainProcessFlowName",
           l.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION  "mainProcessFlowVersion",
           l.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME "mainProcessFlowSeqName",
           l.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME          "processFlowName",
           l.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION       "processFlowVersion",
           l.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME      "processFlowSeqName",
           l.PROCESS_STEP_NAME          "processStepName",
           l.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION       "processStepVersion",
           l.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME      "retProcessFlowName",
           l.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION   "retProcessFlowVersion",
           l.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME  "retProcessFlowSeqName",
           l.LOT_CONTAMINATION_LEVEL     "lotContaminationLevel",
           ps.DESCRIPTION                 "stepDesc",
           A.LOT_PRODUCT_TYPE             "productType",
           A.LOT_PRODUCTION_TYPE          "productionType",
           A.LOT_PRODUCT_USAGE            "productUsage"
    FROM (SELECT process_job_lot.* FROM process_job_lot WHERE process_job_name = #{batchId}) A
           LEFT JOIN lot l ON A.lot_name = l.lot_name
           LEFT JOIN process_step ps ON ps.PROCESS_STEP_NAME = l.PROCESS_STEP_NAME AND
                                        ((ps.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION = l.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION) OR
                                         (ps.PROCESS_STEP_STATE = 'Active' AND l.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION = 'AA'))
    <where>
      <if test="productionType != null and productionType != ''">
        A.LOT_PRODUCTION_TYPE = #{productionType}
      </if>
    </where>

SELECT l.LOT_NAME                     "lotName",
           l.PRODUCT_TYPE                 "productType",
           l.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME             "productDefName",
           l.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION          "productDefVersion",
           l.WORK_ORDER_NAME              "workOrderName",
           l.ORIGINAL_LOT_NAME            "originalLotName",
           l.PARENT_LOT_NAME              "parentLotName",
           l.SOURCE_LOT_NAME              "sourceLotName",
           l.TARGET_LOT_NAME              "targetLotName",
           l.LOT_TYPE                     "lotType",
           l.DUE_DATE                     "dueDate",
           l.LOT_PRIORITY                 "lotPriority",
           l.LOT_STATE                    "lotState",
           l.PRODUCT_QUANTITY             "productQuantity",
           l.LOT_PROCESS_STATE            "lotProcessState",
           l.EQUIPMENT_NAME               "equipmentName",
           l.EQUIPMENT_RECIPE_NAME        "equipmentRecipeName",
           l.LOT_HOLD_STATE               "lotHoldState",
           l.LOT_HOLD_COUNT               "lotHoldCount",
           l.REASON_CODE                  "reasonCode",
           l.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME     "mainProcessFlowName",
           l.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION  "mainProcessFlowVersion",
           l.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME "mainProcessFlowSeqName",
           l.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME          "processFlowName",
           l.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION       "processFlowVersion",
           l.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME      "processFlowSeqName",
           l.PROCESS_STEP_NAME          "processStepName",
           l.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION       "processStepVersion",
           l.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME      "retProcessFlowName",
           l.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION   "retProcessFlowVersion",
           l.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME  "retProcessFlowSeqName",
           l.LOT_CONTAMINATION_LEVEL     "lotContaminationLevel",
           ps.DESCRIPTION                 "stepDesc"
    FROM (SELECT t1.LOT_NAME
          FROM LOT t1
                 JOIN PRODUCT_DEF t2 ON t2.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME = t1.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME AND
                                        ((t2.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION = t1.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION AND t1.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION != 'AA') OR
                                         (t2.PRODUCT_DEF_STATE = 'Active' AND t1.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION = 'AA'))
          WHERE t2.PRODUCTION_TYPE = 'Dummy'
            AND t1.EQUIPMENT_NAME = #{equipmentName}) A
           LEFT JOIN lot l ON A.lot_name = l.lot_name
           LEFT JOIN process_step ps ON ps.PROCESS_STEP_NAME = l.PROCESS_STEP_NAME AND
                                        ((ps.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION = l.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION AND l.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION != 'AA') OR
                                         (ps.PROCESS_STEP_STATE = 'Active' AND l.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION = 'AA'))

SELECT l.LOT_NAME                     "lotName",
           l.PRODUCT_TYPE                 "productType",
           l.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME             "productDefName",
           l.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION          "productDefVersion",
           l.WORK_ORDER_NAME              "workOrderName",
           l.ORIGINAL_LOT_NAME            "originalLotName",
           l.PARENT_LOT_NAME              "parentLotName",
           l.SOURCE_LOT_NAME              "sourceLotName",
           l.TARGET_LOT_NAME              "targetLotName",
           l.LOT_TYPE                     "lotType",
           l.DUE_DATE                     "dueDate",
           l.LOT_PRIORITY                 "lotPriority",
           l.LOT_STATE                    "lotState",
           l.PRODUCT_QUANTITY             "productQuantity",
           l.LOT_PROCESS_STATE            "lotProcessState",
           l.EQUIPMENT_NAME               "equipmentName",
           l.EQUIPMENT_RECIPE_NAME        "equipmentRecipeName",
           l.LOT_HOLD_STATE               "lotHoldState",
           l.LOT_HOLD_COUNT               "lotHoldCount",
           l.REASON_CODE                  "reasonCode",
           l.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME     "mainProcessFlowName",
           l.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION  "mainProcessFlowVersion",
           l.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME "mainProcessFlowSeqName",
           l.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME          "processFlowName",
           l.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION       "processFlowVersion",
           l.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME      "processFlowSeqName",
           l.PROCESS_STEP_NAME          "processStepName",
           l.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION       "processStepVersion",
           l.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME      "retProcessFlowName",
           l.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION   "retProcessFlowVersion",
           l.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME  "retProcessFlowSeqName",
           l.LOT_CONTAMINATION_LEVEL     "lotContaminationLevel",
           ps.DESCRIPTION                 "stepDesc"
    FROM (SELECT lot_name FROM process_job_lot WHERE process_job_name = #{batchId} AND LOT_PRODUCT_TYPE = 'NPW') A
           LEFT JOIN lot l ON A.lot_name = l.lot_name
           LEFT JOIN process_step ps ON ps.PROCESS_STEP_NAME = l.PROCESS_STEP_NAME AND
                                        ((ps.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION = l.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION AND l.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION != 'AA') OR
                                         (ps.PROCESS_STEP_STATE = 'Active' AND l.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION = 'AA'))

SELECT
    l.LOT_NAME "lotName",
    l.PRODUCT_TYPE "productType",
    l.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME "productDefName",
    l.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION "productDefVersion",
    l.WORK_ORDER_NAME "workOrderName",
    l.ORIGINAL_LOT_NAME "originalLotName",
    l.PARENT_LOT_NAME "parentLotName",
    l.SOURCE_LOT_NAME "sourceLotName",
    l.TARGET_LOT_NAME "targetLotName",
    l.LOT_TYPE "lotType",
    l.DUE_DATE "dueDate",
    l.LOT_PRIORITY "lotPriority",
    l.LOT_STATE "lotState",
    l.LOT_NPW_STATE "lotNpwState",
    l.PRODUCT_QUANTITY "productQuantity",
    l.LOT_PROCESS_STATE "lotProcessState",
    l.EQUIPMENT_NAME "equipmentName",
    l.EQUIPMENT_RECIPE_NAME "equipmentRecipeName",
    l.LOT_HOLD_STATE "lotHoldState",
    l.LOT_HOLD_COUNT "lotHoldCount",
    l.REASON_CODE "reasonCode",
    L.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME "mainProcessFlowName",
    L.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION "mainProcessFlowVersion",
    L.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME "mainProcessFlowSeqName",
    L.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME "processFlowName",
    L.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION "processFlowVersion",
    L.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME "processFlowSeqName",
    L.PROCESS_STEP_NAME "processStepName",
    L.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION "processStepVersion",
    L.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME "retProcessFlowName",
    L.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION "retProcessFlowVersion",
    L.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME "retProcessFlowSeqName",
    l.LOT_CONTAMINATION_LEVEL "lotContaminationLevel",
	pd.PRODUCTION_TYPE "productionType",
    (
    CASE
    WHEN INSTR(COALESCE(LPFC.RECIPE_NAME, PFC.RECIPE_NAME), '$') > 0 THEN (
    COALESCE(
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE
    FROM LOT_PF_PARAMETER Y
    WHERE Y.LOT_NAME = l.LOT_NAME
    AND Y.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = L.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME
    AND Y.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = L.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION
    AND Y.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = L.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME
    AND Y.PARAMETER_NAME = REPLACE(COALESCE(LPFC.RECIPE_NAME, PFC.RECIPE_NAME), '$', '')),
    (
    SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE
    FROM PRODUCT_DEF_PF_PARAMETER Z
    WHERE Z.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME = l.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME
    AND PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION = l.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION
    AND PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = L.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME
    AND PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = L.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION
    AND PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = L.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME
    AND PARAMETER_NAME = REPLACE(COALESCE(LPFC.RECIPE_NAME, PFC.RECIPE_NAME), '$', ''))))
    ELSE COALESCE(LPFC.RECIPE_NAME, PFC.RECIPE_NAME)
    END
    ) AS "recipeName",
    (
    SELECT CARRIER_NAME
    FROM (
    SELECT CARRIER_NAME, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY CARRIER_NAME) AS row_num
    FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT C.CARRIER_NAME
    FROM PRODUCT P
    INNER JOIN CARRIER_SLOT C ON P.PRODUCT_NAME = C.MATERIAL_NAME
    WHERE P.LOT_NAME = L.LOT_NAME
    ) A
    ) A
    WHERE row_num = 1
    ) AS "carrierName"
    FROM LOT L
    LEFT JOIN PROCESS_FLOW PF ON PF.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = L.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME
    AND (L.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = PF.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION OR (L.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = 'AA' AND PF.PROCESS_FLOW_STATE = 'Active'))
    LEFT JOIN
        PROCESS_FLOW_CONTENT PFC ON PFC.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = PF.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME
        AND PFC.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = PF.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION
        AND PFC.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = L.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME
    LEFT JOIN LOT_PF_CONTENT LPFC ON LPFC.LOT_NAME = L.LOT_NAME
        AND LPFC.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = PF.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME
        AND LPFC.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = PF.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION
        AND LPFC.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = L.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME
    LEFT JOIN PRODUCT_DEF pd ON pd.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME = L.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME
    AND (pd.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION = L.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION OR (pd.PRODUCT_DEF_STATE = 'Active' AND L.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION = 'AA'))
    <where>
      L.LOT_STATE = 'Released'
      AND L.LOT_PROCESS_STATE = 'Wait'
      AND L.PRODUCT_TYPE != 'NPW'
      AND pd.PRODUCTION_TYPE = 'Production'
      AND (
      (L.FACTORY_NAME = #{factoryName} AND L.LOT_STORE_STATE <> 'Sending')
      OR (L.SEND_FACTORY_NAME = #{factoryName} AND L.LOT_STORE_STATE = 'Sending')
      )
      AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM PRODUCT WHERE LOT_NAME != PRODUCT_NAME AND L.LOT_NAME = LOT_NAME
      )
      AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM PRODUCT WHERE PRODUCT_STATE = 'Scrapped' AND L.LOT_NAME = LOT_NAME
      )
      <if test="lotName != null and lotName != ''">
        AND L.LOT_NAME = #{lotName}
      </if>
      <if test="equipmentName != null and equipmentName != ''">
        AND EXISTS (SELECT 1
        FROM EQUIPMENT_DEF JOIN  EQUIPMENT_CAPABILITY
        ON EQUIPMENT_DEF.EQUIPMENT_NAME = EQUIPMENT_CAPABILITY.EQUIPMENT_NAME
        where EQUIPMENT_DEF.EQUIPMENT_NAME = #{equipmentName} and EQUIPMENT_CAPABILITY.PROCESS_CAPABILITY_NAME =
        (
        CASE
        WHEN INSTR(COALESCE(LPFC.PROCESS_CAPABILITY_NAME, PFC.PROCESS_CAPABILITY_NAME), '$') > 0 THEN (
        COALESCE(
        (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE
        FROM LOT_PF_PARAMETER Y
        WHERE Y.LOT_NAME = l.LOT_NAME
        AND Y.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = L.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME
        AND Y.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = L.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION
        AND Y.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = L.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME
        AND Y.PARAMETER_NAME = REPLACE(COALESCE(LPFC.PROCESS_CAPABILITY_NAME, PFC.PROCESS_CAPABILITY_NAME), '$', '')),
        (
        SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE
        FROM PRODUCT_DEF_PF_PARAMETER Z
        WHERE Z.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME = l.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME
        AND PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION = l.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION
        AND PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = L.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME
        AND PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = L.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION
        AND PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = L.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME
        AND PARAMETER_NAME = REPLACE(COALESCE(LPFC.PROCESS_CAPABILITY_NAME, PFC.PROCESS_CAPABILITY_NAME), '$', ''))))
        ELSE COALESCE(LPFC.PROCESS_CAPABILITY_NAME, PFC.PROCESS_CAPABILITY_NAME)
        END
        ))
      </if>
      <if test="recipeName != null and recipeName != ''">
        AND (
        CASE
        WHEN INSTR(COALESCE(LPFC.RECIPE_NAME, PFC.RECIPE_NAME), '$') > 0 THEN (
        COALESCE(
        (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE
        FROM LOT_PF_PARAMETER Y
        WHERE Y.LOT_NAME = l.LOT_NAME
        AND Y.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = L.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME
        AND Y.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = L.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION
        AND Y.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = L.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME
        AND Y.PARAMETER_NAME = REPLACE(COALESCE(LPFC.RECIPE_NAME, PFC.RECIPE_NAME), '$', '')),
        (
        SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE
        FROM PRODUCT_DEF_PF_PARAMETER Z
        WHERE Z.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME = l.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME
        AND PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION = l.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION
        AND PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = L.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME
        AND PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = L.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION
        AND PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = L.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME
        AND PARAMETER_NAME = REPLACE(COALESCE(LPFC.RECIPE_NAME, PFC.RECIPE_NAME), '$', ''))))
        ELSE COALESCE(LPFC.RECIPE_NAME, PFC.RECIPE_NAME)
        END
        ) = #{recipeName}

      <if test="batchId != null and batchId != ''">

SELECT
    pd.PRODUCT_TYPE   "productType",
    pd.PRODUCTION_TYPE "productionType",
    pd.product_usage "productUsage",
    l.LOT_NAME "lotName",
    l.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME "productDefName",
    l.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION "productDefVersion",
    l.WORK_ORDER_NAME "workOrderName",
    l.ORIGINAL_LOT_NAME "originalLotName",
    l.PARENT_LOT_NAME "parentLotName",

    l.TARGET_LOT_NAME "targetLotName",
    l.LOT_TYPE "lotType",
    l.DUE_DATE "dueDate",
    l.LOT_PRIORITY "lotPriority",
    l.LOT_STATE "lotState",
    l.LOT_NPW_STATE "lotNpwState",
    l.PRODUCT_QUANTITY "productQuantity",
    l.LOT_PROCESS_STATE "lotProcessState",
    l.EQUIPMENT_NAME "equipmentName",
    l.EQUIPMENT_RECIPE_NAME "equipmentRecipeName",
    l.LOT_HOLD_STATE "lotHoldState",
    l.LOT_HOLD_COUNT "lotHoldCount",
    l.REASON_CODE "reasonCode",
    L.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME "mainProcessFlowName",
    L.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION "mainProcessFlowVersion",
    L.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME "mainProcessFlowSeqName",
    L.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME "processFlowName",
    L.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION "processFlowVersion",
    L.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME "processFlowSeqName",
    L.PROCESS_STEP_NAME "processStepName",
    L.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION "processStepVersion",
    L.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME "retProcessFlowName",
    L.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION "retProcessFlowVersion",
    L.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME "retProcessFlowSeqName",
    l.LOT_CONTAMINATION_LEVEL "lotContaminationLevel",
    (
    CASE
    WHEN INSTR(PFC.RECIPE_NAME, '$') > 0 THEN (
    COALESCE(
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE
    FROM LOT_PF_PARAMETER Y
    WHERE Y.LOT_NAME = l.LOT_NAME
    AND Y.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = L.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME
    AND Y.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = L.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION
    AND Y.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = L.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME
    AND Y.PARAMETER_NAME = REPLACE(PFC.RECIPE_NAME, '$', '')),
    (
    SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE
    FROM PRODUCT_DEF_PF_PARAMETER Z
    WHERE Z.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME = l.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME
    AND PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION = l.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION
    AND PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = L.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME
    AND PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = L.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION
    AND PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = L.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME
    AND PARAMETER_NAME = REPLACE(PFC.RECIPE_NAME, '$', ''))))
    ELSE PFC.RECIPE_NAME
    END
    ) AS "recipeName",
    (
    SELECT CARRIER_NAME
    FROM (
    SELECT CARRIER_NAME, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY CARRIER_NAME) AS row_num
    FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT C.CARRIER_NAME
    FROM PRODUCT P
    INNER JOIN CARRIER_SLOT C ON P.PRODUCT_NAME = C.MATERIAL_NAME
    WHERE P.LOT_NAME = L.LOT_NAME
    ) A
    ) A
    WHERE row_num = 1
    ) AS "carrierName"
    FROM LOT L
    LEFT JOIN PROCESS_FLOW PF ON PF.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = L.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME
    AND (L.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = PF.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION OR (L.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = 'AA' AND PF.PROCESS_FLOW_STATE = 'Active'))
    LEFT JOIN PROCESS_FLOW_CONTENT PFC ON PFC.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = PF.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME
    AND PFC.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = PF.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION
    AND PFC.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = L.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME
    LEFT JOIN PRODUCT_DEF pd ON pd.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME = L.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME
    AND (pd.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION = L.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION OR (pd.PRODUCT_DEF_STATE = 'Active' AND L.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION = 'AA'))
    <where>
      L.LOT_STATE = 'Released'
      AND L.LOT_PROCESS_STATE = 'Wait'
      AND L.PRODUCT_TYPE = 'NPW'
      AND pd.PRODUCTION_TYPE = 'Monitor'
      AND (
      (L.FACTORY_NAME = #{factoryName} AND L.LOT_STORE_STATE <> 'Sending')
      OR (L.SEND_FACTORY_NAME = #{factoryName} AND L.LOT_STORE_STATE = 'Sending')
      )
      AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM PRODUCT WHERE LOT_NAME != PRODUCT_NAME AND L.LOT_NAME = LOT_NAME
      )
      AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM PRODUCT WHERE PRODUCT_STATE = 'Scrapped' AND L.LOT_NAME = LOT_NAME
      )
      <if test="lotName != null and lotName != ''">
        AND L.LOT_NAME = #{lotName}
      </if>
      <if test="equipmentName != null and equipmentName != ''">
        AND EXISTS(
        SELECT 1
        FROM
        (SELECT DICT_CONST.* FROM DICT_CONST where DICT_CONST.CONST_CODE = 'NPW_PRODUCT_DEF_NAME_RULE_AREA_SECTION_IDX') t1
        JOIN DICT_ENUM_VALUE t2 ON t2.ENUM_TYPE = 'ProductAreaMap'
        AND t2.ENUM_VALUE = (
        CASE
        WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(t1.CONST_VALUE, '^[0-9]+$')
        THEN SUBSTR(L.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME, TO_NUMBER(t1.CONST_VALUE), 1)
        ELSE NULL
        END
        )
        JOIN (
        WITH recursive_table (AREA_NAME, SUPER_AREA_NAME, LV) AS (
        SELECT a2.AREA_NAME, a2.SUPER_AREA_NAME, 1 AS LV
        FROM EQUIPMENT_DEF a1
        JOIN AREA a2 ON a2.AREA_NAME = a1.AREA_NAME
        WHERE a1.EQUIPMENT_NAME = #{equipmentName}
        UNION ALL
        SELECT a3.AREA_NAME, a3.SUPER_AREA_NAME, a4.LV + 1
        FROM AREA a3
        JOIN recursive_table a4 ON a4.SUPER_AREA_NAME = a3.AREA_NAME
        WHERE a4.LV < 5
        )
        SELECT * FROM recursive_table a5
        ) t3 ON t3.AREA_NAME = t2.LABEL
        )
      </if>
      <if test="recipeName != null and recipeName != ''">
        AND (
        CASE
        WHEN INSTR(PFC.RECIPE_NAME, '$') > 0 THEN (
        COALESCE(
        (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE
        FROM LOT_PF_PARAMETER Y
        WHERE Y.LOT_NAME = l.LOT_NAME
        AND Y.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = L.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME
        AND Y.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = L.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION
        AND Y.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = L.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME
        AND Y.PARAMETER_NAME = REPLACE(PFC.RECIPE_NAME, '$', '')),
        (
        SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE
        FROM PRODUCT_DEF_PF_PARAMETER Z
        WHERE Z.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME = l.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME
        AND PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION = l.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION
        AND PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = L.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME
        AND PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = L.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION
        AND PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = L.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME
        AND PARAMETER_NAME = REPLACE(PFC.RECIPE_NAME, '$', ''))))
        ELSE PFC.RECIPE_NAME
        END
        ) = #{recipeName}
      </if>
      <if test="equipmentName != null and equipmentName != ''">
        AND (
        NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM EQUIPMENT_DEF EQ
        WHERE EQ.EQUIPMENT_NAME = #{equipmentName}
        AND EQ.CONSTRUCT_TYPE1 = 'Internal'
        AND EQ.CONSTRUCT_TYPE2 = 'Furnace'
        )
        OR pd.PRODUCT_USAGE = 'FurnaceMonitor'
        )
      </if>
      <if test="batchId != null and batchId != ''">
        AND NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM PROCESS_JOB_LOT PJL
        WHERE PJL.LOT_NAME = L.LOT_NAME
        AND PJL.PROCESS_JOB_NAME = #{batchId}
        )
      </if>
      AND NOT EXISTS(
      SELECT 1
      FROM PROCESS_JOB_LOT PJL2
      INNER JOIN PROCESS_JOB PJ2 ON PJL2.PROCESS_JOB_NAME = PJ2.PROCESS_JOB_NAME
      WHERE PJL2.LOT_NAME = L.LOT_NAME
      AND PJ2.PROCESS_JOB_STATE in ('Created','Queued','Executing')
      )
    </where>
    ORDER BY L.LOT_NAME

SELECT
    A.ID AS "id",
    A.lot_name AS "lotName",
    A.lot_type AS "lotType",
    A.lot_priority AS "lotPriority",
    A.lot_state AS "lotState",
    A.lot_process_state AS "lotProcessState",
    A.lot_store_state AS "lotStoreState",
    A.lot_hold_state AS "lotHoldState",
    A.lot_hold_count AS "lotHoldCount",
    A.reason_code AS "reasonCode",
    A.product_def_name AS "productDefName",
    A.product_def_version AS "productDefVersion",
    A.product_type AS "productType",
    A.product_quantity AS "productQuantity",
        <choose>
        <when test="_databaseId == 'mysql'">
    DATE_FORMAT(A.due_date, '%Y-%m-%d')
        </when>
              <otherwise>
                to_char(A.due_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
              </otherwise>
            </choose> AS "dueDate",
            A.equipment_name AS "equipmentName",
            A.equipment_recipe_name AS "equipmentRecipeName",
            A.EQP_RECIPE_ID AS "eqpRecipeId",
            A.equipment_port_name AS "equipmentPortName",
            A.area_name AS "areaName",
            A.work_order_name AS "workOrderName",
            A.factory_name AS "factoryName",
            A.send_factory_name AS "sendFactoryName",
            A.event_name AS "eventName",
            A.event_user AS "eventUser",
            A.event_comment AS "eventComment",
            A.event_time AS "eventTime",
            A.main_process_flow_name AS "mainProcessFlowName",
            A.main_process_flow_version AS "mainProcessFlowVersion",
            A.main_process_flow_seq_name AS "mainProcessFlowSeqName",
            A.process_flow_name AS "processFlowName",
            A.process_flow_version AS "processFlowVersion",
            A.process_flow_seq_name AS "processFlowSeqName",
            A.process_step_name AS "processStepName",
            A.process_step_version AS "processStepVersion",
            A.ret_process_flow_name AS "retProcessFlowName",
            A.ret_process_flow_version AS "retProcessFlowVersion",
            A.ret_process_flow_seq_name AS "retProcessFlowSeqName",
            A.lot_contamination_level AS "lotContaminationLevel",
            PS.description AS "stepDesc",
            (
              SELECT label
              FROM dict_enum_value
              WHERE enum_type = 'ContaminationLevel'
                AND enum_value = A.lot_contamination_level || ''
            ) AS "contaminationLabel",
            (
              CASE WHEN A.RETICLE_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN A.RETICLE_NAME
                WHEN INSTR(COALESCE(D.RETICLE_NAME, D.RETICLE_GROUP_NAME), '$') > 0 THEN (
                    SELECT COALESCE(
                                            MAX(CASE WHEN Z.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME
                                            AND Z.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION
                                            AND Z.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME
                                            THEN Z.PARAMETER_VALUE END),
                                            MAX(CASE WHEN Z.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = '*'
                                            AND Z.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = '*'
                                            AND Z.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = '*'
                                            THEN Z.PARAMETER_VALUE END), COALESCE(D.RETICLE_NAME, D.RETICLE_GROUP_NAME))
		FROM
			PRODUCT_DEF_PF_PARAMETER Z
		WHERE
			Z.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME = A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME
			AND PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION = A.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION
			AND PARAMETER_NAME = REPLACE(COALESCE(D.RETICLE_NAME, D.RETICLE_GROUP_NAME), '$', '') 
                    )
                ELSE COALESCE(D.RETICLE_NAME, D.RETICLE_GROUP_NAME)
              END
            ) AS "reticleGroupName",
            (
              CASE
                WHEN INSTR(D.probe_card_name, '$') > 0 THEN (
                  SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE
                  FROM PRODUCT_DEF_PF_PARAMETER Z
                  WHERE Z.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME = A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME
                    AND Z.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION = A.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION
                    AND Z.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME
                    AND Z.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION
                    AND Z.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME
                    AND Z.PARAMETER_NAME = REPLACE(D.probe_card_name, '$', '')
                )
                ELSE D.probe_card_name
              END
            ) AS "probeCardName",
            (
              CASE
                WHEN INSTR(D.recipe_name, '$') > 0 THEN (
                  SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE
                  FROM PRODUCT_DEF_PF_PARAMETER Z
                  WHERE Z.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME = A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME
                    AND Z.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION = A.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION
                    AND Z.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME
                    AND Z.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION
                    AND Z.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME
                    AND Z.PARAMETER_NAME = REPLACE(D.recipe_name, '$', '')
                )
                ELSE D.recipe_name
              END
            ) AS "recipeName",
            (
              SELECT RAW_LOT_NAME
              FROM product
              WHERE lot_name = A.lot_name
                AND rownum = 1
            ) AS "rawLotName",
            (
              SELECT carrier_name
              FROM carrier_slot
              WHERE MATERIAL_NAME = (
                SELECT PRODUCT_NAME
                FROM product
                WHERE lot_name = A.lot_name
                  AND rownum = 1
              )
            ) AS "carrierName",
            (
              SELECT carrier_type
              FROM carrier
              WHERE carrier_name = (
                SELECT carrier_name
                FROM carrier_slot
                WHERE MATERIAL_NAME = (
                  SELECT PRODUCT_NAME
                  FROM product
                  WHERE lot_name = A.lot_name
                    AND rownum = 1
                )
              )
            ) AS "carrierType",
            (
              SELECT carrier_def_name
              FROM carrier
              WHERE carrier_name = (
                SELECT carrier_name
                FROM carrier_slot
                WHERE MATERIAL_NAME = (
                  SELECT PRODUCT_NAME
                  FROM product
                  WHERE lot_name = A.lot_name
                    AND rownum = 1
                )
              )
            ) AS "carrierDefName",
            A.event_comment AS "lastEventComment",
            (
              SELECT to_char(EVENT_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD hh24:mi:ss')
              FROM LOT_HISTORY
              WHERE LOT_HISTORY.LOT_NAME = A.lot_name
                AND EVENT_NAME = 'Release'
            ) AS "releaseTime",
            (SELECT LISTAGG(PRODUCT_NAME, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PRODUCT_NAME)
             FROM PRODUCT
             WHERE LOT_NAME = A.LOT_NAME
            ) AS "wafers",
            le.LOT_EXP_STATE AS "lotExpState"
          FROM (
            SELECT *
            FROM lot A
            WHERE A.lot_name = #{lotName}
              AND (
                (A.lot_store_state = 'Sending' AND A.send_factory_name = #{factoryName})
                OR (A.lot_store_state != 'Sending' AND A.factory_name = #{factoryName})
              )
          ) A
          LEFT JOIN PROCESS_FLOW PF
            ON PF.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME
            AND (
              (PF.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION)
              OR (A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = 'AA' AND PF.PROCESS_FLOW_STATE = 'Active')
            )
          LEFT JOIN PROCESS_FLOW_CONTENT D
            ON A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = D.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME
            AND PF.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = D.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION
            AND A.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = D.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME
          LEFT JOIN (
            SELECT DISTINCT PROCESS_STEP_NAME, PROCESS_STAGE_NAME, DESCRIPTION
            FROM PROCESS_STEP
          ) PS ON PS.PROCESS_STEP_NAME = A.PROCESS_STEP_NAME
          LEFT JOIN LOT_EXP le
            ON le.LOT_NAME = A.LOT_NAME
            AND le.LOT_EXP_STATE NOT IN ('Completed', 'Cancelled')

SELECT DISTINCT
		t1.LOT_NAME "lotName", t1.ACTION_COUNT "actionCount", t1.EVENT_USER "eventUser",
		t1.ACTION_COMMENT "actionComment", REGEXP_REPLACE( t1.TO_USER_GROUP, '[^;|]+\|', '') "toUserGroup", 
		t2.PRODUCT_TYPE "productType", t2.LOT_PRIORITY
		"lotPriority", t2.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME "productDefName",
		t2.PRODUCT_QUANTITY "productQuantity", t2.LOT_PROCESS_STATE
		"lotProcessState", t2.LOT_HOLD_STATE "lotHoldState", t2.LOT_TYPE
		"lotType", t2.DUE_DATE "dueDate", t2.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME "processFlowSeqName", 
		t2.PROCESS_STEP_NAME "processStepName", t4.DESCRIPTION "stepDesc"
		FROM ( SELECT t1a.LOT_NAME, t1a.EVENT_USER, t1a.ACTION_COMMENT, t1a.TO_USER_GROUP, COUNT(t1a.LOT_NAME) OVER (PARTITION BY t1a.LOT_NAME) ACTION_COUNT, ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY t1a.LOT_NAME ORDER BY t1a.EVENT_TIME DESC) RN 
        FROM LOT_ACTION_HISTORY t1a
        <where>
			AND t1a.EVENT_NAME = 'Create'
			<if test="lotName != null and lotName != ''"> AND t1a.LOT_NAME like concat ( concat ('%', #{lotName}) ,'%' )
			</if>
			<if test="startTime !=null and startTime != ''">
				AND t1a.EVENT_TIME <![CDATA[>= to_timestamp(#{startTime}, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')]]>
			</if>
			<if test="endTime != null and endTime != ''">
				AND t1a.EVENT_TIME <![CDATA[<= to_timestamp(#{endTime}, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')]]>
			</if>
		</where>) t1
		JOIN LOT t2 ON t2.LOT_NAME = t1.LOT_NAME
		LEFT JOIN PROCESS_STEP t4 ON t4.PROCESS_STEP_NAME = t2.PROCESS_STEP_NAME
		AND t4.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION = t2.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION
		WHERE t1.RN = 1
		<if test="factoryName != null and factoryName != ''"> 
			AND t2.FACTORY_NAME = #{factoryName}
		</if>

SELECT
    A.ID                  "id",
    A.lot_name            "lotName",
    A.lot_type            "lotType",
    A.lot_priority        "lotPriority",
    A.lot_state           "lotState",
    A.lot_process_state   "lotProcessState",
    A.lot_store_state     "lotStoreState",
    A.lot_hold_state      "lotHoldState",
    A.lot_hold_count      "lotHoldCount",
    A.reason_code         "reasonCode",
    A.product_def_name    "productDefName",
    A.product_def_version "productDefVersion",
    A.product_type        "productType",
    A.PRODUCTION_TYPE     "productionType",
    A.product_quantity    "productQuantity",
    A.AGING_GOOD_COUNT    "agingGoodCount",
    A.AGING_NG_COUNT      "agingNgCount",

    <choose>
        <when test="_databaseId == 'mysql'">
            DATE_FORMAT(A.due_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS "dueDate",
        </when>
        <otherwise>
            to_char(A.due_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD')   AS "dueDate",
        </otherwise>
    </choose>

    A.equipment_name          "equipmentName",
    A.equipment_recipe_name   "equipmentRecipeName",
    A.area_name               "areaName",
    A.work_order_name         "workOrderName",
    A.AGING_PRODUCTION_TYPE   "agingProductionType",
    A.factory_name            "factoryName",
    A.send_factory_name       "sendFactoryName",
    A.event_name              "eventName",
    A.event_user              "eventUser",
    A.event_comment           "eventComment",
    A.event_time              "eventTime",
    A.main_process_flow_name      "mainProcessFlowName",
    A.main_process_flow_version   "mainProcessFlowVersion",
    A.main_process_flow_seq_name  "mainProcessFlowSeqName",
    A.process_flow_name           "processFlowName",
    A.process_flow_version        "processFlowVersion",
    A.process_flow_seq_name       "processFlowSeqName",
    A.process_step_name           "processStepName",
    A.process_step_version        "processStepVersion",
    (
        SELECT process_step_type
        FROM process_step
        WHERE process_step_name = A.process_step_name
          AND (process_step_version = A.process_step_version
               OR process_step_version = 'AA')
    ) AS "processStepType",
    A.ret_process_flow_name     "retProcessFlowName",
    A.ret_process_flow_version  "retProcessFlowVersion",
    A.ret_process_flow_seq_name "retProcessFlowSeqName",
    (
        CASE
            WHEN INSTR(D.recipe_name, '$') > 0 THEN
                (
                    SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE
                    FROM PRODUCT_DEF_PF_PARAMETER Z
                    WHERE Z.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME      = A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME
                      AND Z.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION   = A.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION
                      AND Z.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME     = A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME
                      AND Z.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION  = A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION
                      AND Z.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME
                      AND Z.PARAMETER_NAME        = REPLACE(D.recipe_name, '$', '')
                )
            ELSE
                D.recipe_name
        END
    ) AS "recipeName",
    (
        SELECT RAW_LOT_NAME
        FROM product
        WHERE lot_name = A.lot_name
          AND ROWNUM = 1
    ) AS "rawLotName",
    (
        SELECT carrier_name
        FROM carrier_slot
        WHERE MATERIAL_NAME = (
            SELECT PRODUCT_NAME
            FROM product
            WHERE lot_name = A.lot_name
              AND ROWNUM = 1
        )
    ) AS "carrireName",
    (
        SELECT carrier_type
        FROM carrier
        WHERE carrier_name = (
            SELECT carrier_name
            FROM carrier_slot
            WHERE MATERIAL_NAME = (
                SELECT PRODUCT_NAME
                FROM product
                WHERE lot_name = A.lot_name
                  AND ROWNUM = 1
            )
        )
    ) AS "carrireType",
    (
        SELECT carrier_def_name
        FROM carrier
        WHERE carrier_name = (
            SELECT carrier_name
            FROM carrier_slot
            WHERE MATERIAL_NAME = (
                SELECT PRODUCT_NAME
                FROM product
                WHERE lot_name = A.lot_name
                  AND ROWNUM = 1
            )
        )
    ) AS "carrireDefName",
    (
        SELECT to_char(EVENT_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD hh24:mi:ss')
        FROM LOT_HISTORY
        WHERE LOT_HISTORY.LOT_NAME = A.lot_name
          AND EVENT_NAME = 'Release'
    ) AS "releaseTime"
FROM
    (
        SELECT
            A.*,
            pd.PRODUCTION_TYPE
        FROM
            lot A,
            PRODUCT_DEF pd
        WHERE
            A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME = pd.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME
            AND A.lot_name = #{lotName}
            AND (
                   (A.lot_store_state = 'Sending'
                    AND A.send_factory_name = #{factoryName})
                OR (A.lot_store_state != 'Sending'
                    AND A.factory_name      = #{factoryName})
            )
    ) A
    LEFT JOIN process_flow_content D
        ON  A.process_flow_name     = D.process_flow_name
        AND A.process_flow_version  = D.process_flow_version
        AND A.process_flow_seq_name = D.process_flow_seq_name

SELECT
	A.EVENT_TIME "eventTime",
	A.CARRIER_NAME "carrierName",
	A.LOT_NAME "lotName",
	A.PRODUCT_TYPE "productType",
	A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME "productDefName",
	A.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION "productDefVersion",
	A.WORK_ORDER_NAME "workOrderName",
	A.ORIGINAL_LOT_NAME "originalLotName",
	A.PARENT_LOT_NAME "parentLotName",
	A.SOURCE_LOT_NAME "sourceLotName",
	A.TARGET_LOT_NAME "targetLotName",
	A.LOT_TYPE "lotType",
	<choose> 
	<when test = "_databaseId == 'mysql'">TIME_FORMAT (A.due_date,'%Y-%M-%D' ) </when> 
	<otherwise>to_char( A.due_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD' ) </otherwise> 
	</choose> AS "dueDate",
	A.LOT_PRIORITY "lotPriority",
	A.LOT_STATE "lotState",
	A.PRODUCT_QUANTITY "productQuantity",
	A.LOT_PROCESS_STATE "lotProcessState",
	A.EQUIPMENT_NAME "equipmentName",
	A.EQUIPMENT_RECIPE_NAME "equipmentRecipeName",
	A.LOT_HOLD_STATE "lotHoldState",
	A.LOT_HOLD_COUNT "lotHoldCount",
	A.REASON_CODE "reasonCode",
	A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME "mainProcessFlowName",
	A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION "mainProcessFlowVersion",
	A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME "mainProcessFlowSeqName",
	A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME "processFlowName",
	A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION "processFlowVersion",
	A.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME "processFlowSeqName",
	A.PROCESS_STEP_NAME "processStepName",
	A.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION "processStepVersion",
	A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME "retProcessFlowName",
	A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION "retProcessFlowVersion",
	A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME "retProcessFlowSeqName",
	A.AREA_NAME "areaName",
	A.RELEASE_TIME "releaseTime",
	A.SEND_FACTORY_NAME "sendFactoryName",
	A.WAIT_TIME "waitTime",
	A.SORTING_ORDER1 "sortingOrder1",
	A.SORTING_ORDER2 "sortingOrder2",
	A.SORTING_ORDER3 "sortingOrder3",
	A.PROCESS_STAGE_NAME "processStageName",
	A.PROCESS_GROUP2 "processGroup2",
	A.STEP_DESC "stepDesc",
	A.PRODUCTION_TYPE "productionType",
	A.AGING_PRODUCTION_TYPE "agingProductionType",
	( CASE
		WHEN INSTR( A.DC_SPEC_NAME , '$') > 0 THEN (
		SELECT
			PARAMETER_VALUE
		FROM
			PRODUCT_DEF_PF_PARAMETER Z
		WHERE
			Z.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME = A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME
			AND PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION = A.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION
			AND PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME
			AND PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION
			AND PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME
			AND PARAMETER_NAME = REPLACE(A.DC_SPEC_NAME, '$', '') )
		ELSE A.DC_SPEC_NAME
	END ) AS "dcSpecName",
	( CASE
		WHEN INSTR( A.RECIPE_NAME , '$') > 0 THEN (
		SELECT
			PARAMETER_VALUE
		FROM
			PRODUCT_DEF_PF_PARAMETER Z
		WHERE
			Z.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME = A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME
			AND PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION = A.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION
			AND PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME
			AND PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION
			AND PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME
			AND PARAMETER_NAME = REPLACE(A.RECIPE_NAME, '$', '') )
		ELSE A.RECIPE_NAME
	END ) AS "recipeName"
	FROM (
	SELECT
		A.EVENT_TIME,
		A.CARRIER_NAME,
		A.LOT_NAME,
		A.PRODUCT_TYPE,
		A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME,
		A.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION,
		A.WORK_ORDER_NAME,
		A.ORIGINAL_LOT_NAME,
		A.PARENT_LOT_NAME,
		A.SOURCE_LOT_NAME,
		A.TARGET_LOT_NAME,
		A.LOT_TYPE,
		A.AREA_NAME,
		A.RELEASE_TIME,
		A.DUE_DATE,
		A.LOT_PRIORITY,
		A.LOT_STATE,
		A.PRODUCT_QUANTITY,
		A.LOT_PROCESS_STATE,
		A.EQUIPMENT_NAME,
		A.EQUIPMENT_RECIPE_NAME,
		A.LOT_HOLD_STATE,
		A.LOT_HOLD_COUNT,
		A.REASON_CODE,
		A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME,
		A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION,
		A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME,
		A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME,
		A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION,
		A.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME,
		A.PROCESS_STEP_NAME,
		A.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION,
		A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME,
		A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION,
		A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME,
		A.SEND_FACTORY_NAME,
		A.PROCESS_STAGE_NAME,
		A.PROCESS_GROUP2,
		A.DC_SPEC_NAME,
		A.RECIPE_NAME,
		A.RETICLE_GROUP_NAME,
		A.STEP_DESC,
		A.PRODUCTION_TYPE,
		A.AGING_PRODUCTION_TYPE,
		C.SORTING_ORDER SORTING_ORDER1,
		D.SORTING_ORDER SORTING_ORDER2,
		E.SORTING_ORDER SORTING_ORDER3,
		<choose> 
		<when test = "_databaseId == 'mysql'"> TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, A.PROCESS_FLOW_EVENT_TIME, now()) WAIT_TIME </when> 
		<when test = "_databaseId == 'postgres'"> (date_part('day', now()::timestamp - A.PROCESS_FLOW_EVENT_TIME::timestamp) * 24 + date_part('hour', now()::timestamp - A.PROCESS_FLOW_EVENT_TIME::timestamp)) WAIT_TIME </when> 
		<otherwise> ROUND(TO_NUMBER(CAST(systimestamp AS DATE ) - CAST(A.PROCESS_FLOW_EVENT_TIME AS DATE )) * 24 ) WAIT_TIME </otherwise> 
		</choose>
	FROM
		(
		SELECT
			A.EVENT_TIME,
			A.CARRIER_NAME,
			A.LOT_NAME,
			A.PRODUCT_TYPE,
			A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME,
			A.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION,
			A.WORK_ORDER_NAME,
			A.ORIGINAL_LOT_NAME,
			A.PARENT_LOT_NAME,
			A.SOURCE_LOT_NAME,
			A.TARGET_LOT_NAME,
			A.LOT_TYPE,
			A.DUE_DATE,
			A.LOT_PRIORITY,
			A.LOT_STATE,
			A.PRODUCT_QUANTITY,
			A.LOT_PROCESS_STATE,
			A.EQUIPMENT_NAME,
			A.EQUIPMENT_RECIPE_NAME,
			A.LOT_HOLD_STATE,
			A.LOT_HOLD_COUNT,
			A.AREA_NAME,
			A.RELEASE_TIME,
			A.SEND_FACTORY_NAME,
			A.REASON_CODE,
			A.PRODUCTION_TYPE,
			A.AGING_PRODUCTION_TYPE,
			A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME,
			A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION,
			A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME,
			A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME,
			A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION,
			A.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME,
			A.PROCESS_STEP_NAME,
			A.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION,
			A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME,
			A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION,
			A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME,
			A.EVENT_TIME AS PROCESS_FLOW_EVENT_TIME,
			PS.PROCESS_STAGE_NAME,
			PS.PROCESS_GROUP2,
			PS.DESCRIPTION AS STEP_DESC,
			PFC.DC_SPEC_NAME,
			PFC.RECIPE_NAME,
			PFC.RETICLE_GROUP_NAME
		FROM
			<trim prefix = "(" suffix = ")"> 
					SELECT
						DISTINCT L.*,
						PD.PRODUCTION_TYPE
					FROM
						LOT L
					LEFT JOIN PRODUCT_DEF PD ON
						L.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME = PD.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME AND L.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION = PD.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION
					<where> 
						<if test = "_parameter.containsKey('carrierName') and carrierName != null and carrierName != ''">
							AND L.CARRIER_NAME = #{carrierName} 
						</if>
						<if test = "_parameter.containsKey('lotName') and lotName != null and lotName != ''">
							AND L.LOT_NAME = #{lotName} 
						</if>
					</where> 
			</trim> A
			LEFT JOIN PROCESS_FLOW PF ON
				PF.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME
				AND ((PF.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION)
					OR (A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = 'AA'
						AND PF.PROCESS_FLOW_STATE = 'Active'))
			LEFT JOIN PROCESS_FLOW_CONTENT PFC ON
				( A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = PFC.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME
					AND PF.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = PFC.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION
					AND A.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = PFC.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME)
			LEFT JOIN (
				SELECT
					DISTINCT PROCESS_STEP_NAME,
					PROCESS_STAGE_NAME,
					DESCRIPTION,
					PROCESS_GROUP2
				FROM
					PROCESS_STEP) PS ON
				PS.PROCESS_STEP_NAME = A.PROCESS_STEP_NAME 
			<where>
				AND ((A.FACTORY_NAME = #{factoryName}
					AND A.LOT_STORE_STATE <>'Sending')
				OR (A.SEND_FACTORY_NAME = #{factoryName}
					AND A.LOT_STORE_STATE = 'Sending'))
				AND (A.LOT_STATE = 'Created'
					OR EXISTS (
					SELECT
						1
					FROM
						PRODUCT
					WHERE
						LOT_NAME != PRODUCT_NAME
						AND A.LOT_NAME = LOT_NAME))
				AND A.PRODUCT_TYPE LIKE '%_DEVICE' 
				<if test = "processGroup2!=null and processGroup2!=''">
					AND PS.PROCESS_GROUP2 = #{processGroup2} </if> 
				<if test = "processStageName!=null and processStageName!=''">
					AND PS.PROCESS_STAGE_NAME = #{processStageName} </if> 
				<if test = "lotState!=null and lotState!=''">
					AND A.LOT_STATE = #{lotState} </if> 
				<if test = "areaName!=null and areaName!=''">
					AND A.AREA_NAME = #{areaName} </if> 
				<if test = "workOrderName!=null and workOrderName!=''">
					AND A.WORK_ORDER_NAME = #{workOrderName} </if> 
				<if test = "productDefName!=null and productDefName!=''">
					AND A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME = #{productDefName} </if> 
				<if test = "lotPriority!=null">
					AND A.LOT_PRIORITY = #{lotPriority} </if> 
				<if test = "lotType!=null and lotType!=''">
					AND A.LOT_TYPE = #{lotType} </if> 
				<if test = "lotProcessState!=null and lotProcessState!=''">
					AND A.LOT_PROCESS_STATE = #{lotProcessState} </if> 
				<if test = "lotHoldState!=null and lotHoldState!=''">
					AND A.LOT_HOLD_STATE = #{lotHoldState} </if> 
				<if test = "processFlowName!=null and processFlowName!=''">
					AND A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = #{processFlowName} 
				</if> 
				</where> ) A
	LEFT JOIN DICT_ENUM_VALUE C ON
		A.LOT_STATE = C.ENUM_VALUE
		AND C.ENUM_TYPE = 'LotState'
	LEFT JOIN DICT_ENUM_VALUE D ON
		A.LOT_PROCESS_STATE = D.ENUM_VALUE
		AND D.ENUM_TYPE = 'LotProcessState'
	LEFT JOIN DICT_ENUM_VALUE E ON
		A.LOT_HOLD_STATE = E.ENUM_VALUE
		AND E.ENUM_TYPE = 'LotHoldState' ) A
ORDER BY
	SORTING_ORDER1 ASC,
	SORTING_ORDER2 DESC,
	SORTING_ORDER3 ASC 
	<choose> 
	<when test = "_databaseId == 'mysql'"> ,
		IF(ISNULL(A.WAIT_TIME), 1, 0),
		A.WAIT_TIME DESC 
	</when> 
	<otherwise> ,
		A.WAIT_TIME DESC NULLS LAST 
	</otherwise> 
	</choose>,
	A.LOT_NAME ASC

SELECT A.EVENT_TIME "eventTime", A.CARRIER_NAME "carrierName", A.LOT_NAME "lotName", A.PRODUCT_TYPE "productType", A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME
                    "productDefName", A.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION "productDefVersion", A.WORK_ORDER_NAME "workOrderName", A.ORIGINAL_LOT_NAME "originalLotName",
       A.PARENT_LOT_NAME "parentLotName", A.SOURCE_LOT_NAME "sourceLotName", A.TARGET_LOT_NAME "targetLotName", A.LOT_TYPE "lotType",
       <choose>
         <when test="_databaseId == 'mysql'">
           CASE
             WHEN A.LOT_PROCESS_STATE IN ('Reserved', 'Wait') THEN
               TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, A.LAST_MOVE_TIME, NOW())
           END
         </when>
         <when test="_databaseId == 'postgres'">
           CASE
             WHEN A.LOT_PROCESS_STATE IN ('Reserved', 'Wait') THEN
               EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - A.LAST_MOVE_TIME)) / 3600
           END
         </when>
         <otherwise>
           CASE
             WHEN A.LOT_PROCESS_STATE IN ('Reserved', 'Wait') THEN
               ROUND(TO_NUMBER(CAST(systimestamp AS DATE) - CAST(A.LAST_MOVE_TIME AS DATE)) * 24)
           END
         </otherwise>
       </choose>
       AS "lotWaitTime",
        <choose>
        <when test="_databaseId == 'mysql'">TIME_FORMAT ( A.due_date, '%Y-%M-%D' )</when>
      <otherwise>to_char( A.due_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD' )</otherwise>
    </choose>
    AS "dueDate", A.LOT_PRIORITY "lotPriority", A.LOT_STATE "lotState", A.PRODUCT_QUANTITY "productQuantity", A.SCRAPQTY "scrapQty",
    A.LOT_PROCESS_STATE "lotProcessState", A.EQUIPMENT_NAME "equipmentName", A.EQUIPMENT_RECIPE_NAME "equipmentRecipeName", A.LOT_HOLD_STATE
    "lotHoldState", A.LOT_HOLD_COUNT "lotHoldCount", A.REASON_CODE "reasonCode", A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME "mainProcessFlowName",
    A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION "mainProcessFlowVersion", A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME "mainProcessFlowSeqName", A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME
    "processFlowName", A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION "processFlowVersion", A.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME "processFlowSeqName", A.PROCESS_STEP_NAME
    "processStepName", A.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION "processStepVersion", A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME "retProcessFlowName", A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION

    <trim prefix="(" suffix=")">
      SELECT

				SELECT

				FROM
					PRODUCT

				SELECT

				FROM
					PRODUCT
				WHERE LOT_NAME = L.LOT_NAME) END SCRAPQTY
          FROM
			LOT L
