		A.RETICLE_GROUP_NAME,
		A.PROBE_CARD_NAME,
		A.DC_SPEC_NAME,
		A.EVENT_COMMENT,
		A.PROCESS_FLOW_EVENT_TIME,
		A.EVENT_TIME,
		A.PRODUCTION_TYPE,
		C.SORTING_ORDER SORTING_ORDER1,
		D.SORTING_ORDER SORTING_ORDER2,
		E.SORTING_ORDER SORTING_ORDER3,
		
		
		CASE
			WHEN (A.LOT_PROCESS_STATE = 'Wait'
				AND EXISTS (
				SELECT
					1
				FROM
					(
					SELECT
						(CASE
							WHEN INSTR(D.PROCESS_CAPABILITY_NAME, '$') > 0 THEN (
							SELECT
								PARAMETER_VALUE
							FROM
								param_map Z
							WHERE
								Z.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME = A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME
								AND PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION = A.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION
								AND PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME
								AND PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = A.REAL_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION
								AND PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME
								AND PARAMETER_NAME = REPLACE(D.PROCESS_CAPABILITY_NAME, '$', '') )
							ELSE D.PROCESS_CAPABILITY_NAME
						END) AS PROCESS_CAPABILITY_NAME,
						(CASE
							WHEN INSTR(D.RECIPE_NAME, '$') > 0 THEN (
							SELECT
								PARAMETER_VALUE
							FROM
								PRODUCT_DEF_PF_PARAMETER Z
							WHERE
								Z.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME = A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME
								AND PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION = A.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION
								AND PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME
								AND PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = A.REAL_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION
								AND PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME
								AND PARAMETER_NAME = REPLACE(D.RECIPE_NAME, '$', '') )
							ELSE D.RECIPE_NAME
						END) AS RECIPE_NAME
					FROM
						PROCESS_FLOW_CONTENT D
					WHERE
						D.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME
						AND D.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = A.REAL_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION
						AND D.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME ) X
				INNER JOIN EQP_RECIPE C ON
					X.PROCESS_CAPABILITY_NAME = C.PROCESS_CAPABILITY_NAME
					AND C.RECIPE_NAME = X.RECIPE_NAME
				WHERE
					C.EQUIPMENT_NAME = #{eqpName} )) THEN 1
			WHEN (A.LOT_PROCESS_STATE IN ('Done', 'Reserved', 'Run')
				AND A.EQUIPMENT_NAME = #{eqpName}) THEN 1
			ELSE 0
		END flag,
		
		<choose> 
			<when test = "_databaseId == 'mysql'"> 
				TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, A.PROCESS_FLOW_EVENT_TIME, now()) WAIT_TIME 
			</when> 
			<when test = "_databaseId == 'postgres'"> 
				(date_part('day', now()::timestamp - A.PROCESS_FLOW_EVENT_TIME::timestamp) * 24 + date_part('hour', now()::timestamp - A.PROCESS_FLOW_EVENT_TIME::timestamp)) WAIT_TIME 
			</when> 
			<otherwise> 
				ROUND(TO_NUMBER(CAST(systimestamp AS DATE) - CAST(A.PROCESS_FLOW_EVENT_TIME AS DATE)) * 24) WAIT_TIME 
			</otherwise> 
		</choose>,
		A.QTIME_REMAIN
	FROM
		(
		SELECT
			A.CARRIER_NAME,
			A.LOT_NAME,
			A.PRODUCT_TYPE,
			A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME,
			A.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION,
			A.WORK_ORDER_NAME,
			A.ORIGINAL_LOT_NAME,
			A.PARENT_LOT_NAME,
			A.SOURCE_LOT_NAME,
			A.TARGET_LOT_NAME,
			A.LOT_TYPE,
			A.DUE_DATE,
			A.LOT_PRIORITY,
			A.LOT_STATE,
			A.PRODUCT_QUANTITY,
			A.LOT_PROCESS_STATE,
			A.EQUIPMENT_NAME,
			A.EQUIPMENT_RECIPE_NAME,
			A.EQUIPMENT_PORT_NAME,
			A.LOT_HOLD_STATE,
			A.LOT_HOLD_COUNT,
			A.EVENT_COMMENT,
			A.REASON_CODE,
			A.PRODUCTION_TYPE,
			A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME,
			A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION,
			A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME,
			A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME,
			A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION,
			A.EVENT_TIME PROCESS_FLOW_EVENT_TIME,
			PF.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION AS REAL_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION,
			A.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME,
			A.PROCESS_STEP_NAME,
			A.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION,
			PS.DESCRIPTION STEP_DESC,
			A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME,
			A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION,
			A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME,
			A.LOT_CONTAMINATION_LEVEL,
			A.EVENT_TIME,
			PJL.PROCESS_JOB_NAME,
			PFC.RECIPE_NAME,
			PFC.RETICLE_GROUP_NAME,
			PFC.PROBE_CARD_NAME,
			PFC.DC_SPEC_NAME,
			MIN(ROUND(LQT.QUEUE_TIME_LIMIT - TO_NUMBER(CAST(systimestamp AS DATE) - CAST(LQT.ENTER_TIME AS DATE)) * 24 * 60)) QTIME_REMAIN,
			MIN(ROUND(TO_NUMBER(CAST(systimestamp AS DATE) - CAST(LH.EVENT_TIME AS DATE)) * 24)) HOLD_TIME
		FROM
			<trim prefix = "(" suffix = ")"> 
				SELECT
					DISTINCT L.*,
					PD.PRODUCTION_TYPE
				FROM (
					SELECT
						*
					FROM
					    LOT
					WHERE
						LOT_STATE = 'Released'
						AND ( 
							(FACTORY_NAME = #{factoryName} AND LOT_STORE_STATE <>'Sending')
							OR (SEND_FACTORY_NAME = #{factoryName} AND LOT_STORE_STATE = 'Sending') 
						)
				) L
				LEFT JOIN PRODUCT PT ON
					L.LOT_NAME = PT.LOT_NAME
				LEFT JOIN PRODUCT_DEF PD ON
					L.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME = PD.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME AND L.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION = PD.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION
				<where> 
					<if test = "_parameter.containsKey('lotName') and lotName != null and lotName != ''">
						AND PT.LOT_NAME = #{lotName} 
					</if> 
				</where> 
			</trim> A
			LEFT JOIN (
				SELECT
					DISTINCT PROCESS_STEP_NAME,
					DESCRIPTION
				FROM
					PROCESS_STEP) PS ON
				PS.PROCESS_STEP_NAME = A.PROCESS_STEP_NAME
			LEFT JOIN (
				SELECT
					pjl.*
				FROM
					process_job pj
				INNER JOIN process_job_lot pjl ON
					pj.process_job_name = pjl.process_job_name
					AND pj.process_job_state IN ('Created', 'Queued', 'Executing') ) pjl ON
				pjl.lot_name = A.lot_name
			LEFT JOIN PROCESS_FLOW PF ON
				PF.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME
					AND ( (PF.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION)
						OR (A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = 'AA'
							AND PF.PROCESS_FLOW_STATE = 'Active') )
			LEFT JOIN PROCESS_FLOW_CONTENT PFC ON
				( A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = PFC.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME
					AND PF.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = PFC.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION
					AND A.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = PFC.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME )
			LEFT JOIN LOT_QUEUE_TIME LQT ON
				( A.LOT_NAME = LQT.LOT_NAME
					AND LQT.QUEUE_TIME_STATE IN ('Entered')
						AND LQT.EXIT_TIME IS NULL )
			LEFT JOIN LOT_HOLD LH ON
				A.LOT_NAME = LH.LOT_NAME
			WHERE
				A.LOT_STATE = 'Released'
				AND ( 
					(A.FACTORY_NAME = #{factoryName} AND A.LOT_STORE_STATE <>'Sending')
					OR (A.SEND_FACTORY_NAME = #{factoryName} AND A.LOT_STORE_STATE = 'Sending') )
				AND EXISTS (
					SELECT
						1
					FROM
						PRODUCT
					WHERE
						LOT_NAME != PRODUCT_NAME
						AND A.LOT_NAME = LOT_NAME )
			GROUP BY
				A.CARRIER_NAME,
				A.LOT_NAME,
				A.PRODUCT_TYPE,
				A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME,
				A.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION,
				A.WORK_ORDER_NAME,
				A.ORIGINAL_LOT_NAME,
				A.PARENT_LOT_NAME,
				A.SOURCE_LOT_NAME,
				A.TARGET_LOT_NAME,
				A.LOT_TYPE,
				A.DUE_DATE,
				A.LOT_PRIORITY,
				A.LOT_STATE,
				A.PRODUCT_QUANTITY,
				A.LOT_PROCESS_STATE,
				A.EQUIPMENT_NAME,
				A.EQUIPMENT_RECIPE_NAME,
				A.EQUIPMENT_PORT_NAME,
				A.LOT_HOLD_STATE,
				A.LOT_HOLD_COUNT,
				A.EVENT_COMMENT,
				A.REASON_CODE,
				A.PRODUCTION_TYPE,
				A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME,
				A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION,
				A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME,
				A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME,
				A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION,
				A.EVENT_TIME,
				PF.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION,
				A.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME,
				A.PROCESS_STEP_NAME,
				A.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION,
				PS.DESCRIPTION,
				A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME,
				A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION,
				A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME,
				A.LOT_CONTAMINATION_LEVEL,
				PJL.PROCESS_JOB_NAME,
				PFC.RECIPE_NAME,
				PFC.RETICLE_GROUP_NAME,
				PFC.PROBE_CARD_NAME,
				PFC.DC_SPEC_NAME
			ORDER BY
				LQT.ENTER_TIME ) A
	LEFT JOIN enum_map C ON
		A.LOT_STATE = C.ENUM_VALUE
		AND C.ENUM_TYPE = 'LotState'
	LEFT JOIN enum_map D ON
		A.LOT_PROCESS_STATE = D.ENUM_VALUE
		AND D.ENUM_TYPE = 'LotProcessState'
	LEFT JOIN enum_map E ON
		A.LOT_HOLD_STATE = E.ENUM_VALUE
		AND E.ENUM_TYPE = 'LotHoldState' ) A
WHERE
	A.flag = 1
	AND A.PRODUCT_TYPE NOT LIKE '%_DEVICE'
ORDER BY
	A.SORTING_ORDER1 ASC,
	A.SORTING_ORDER2 DESC,
	A.SORTING_ORDER3 ASC 
	<choose> 
		<when test = "_databaseId == 'mysql'"> ,
			IF(ISNULL(A.WAIT_TIME), 1, 0),
			A.WAIT_TIME DESC 
		</when> 
		<otherwise> ,
			A.WAIT_TIME DESC NULLS LAST 
		</otherwise> 
	</choose>

SELECT A.CARRIER_NAME "carrierName", A.LOT_NAME "lotName", A.PRODUCT_TYPE "productType", A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME "productDefName",
    A.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION "productDefVersion", A.WORK_ORDER_NAME "workOrderName", A.ORIGINAL_LOT_NAME "originalLotName", A.PARENT_LOT_NAME
    "parentLotName", A.SOURCE_LOT_NAME "sourceLotName", A.TARGET_LOT_NAME "targetLotName", A.LOT_TYPE "lotType", A.DUE_DATE "dueDate", A.LOT_PRIORITY
    "lotPriority", A.LOT_STATE "lotState", A.PRODUCT_QUANTITY "productQuantity", A.LOT_PROCESS_STATE "lotProcessState", A.EQUIPMENT_NAME
    "equipmentName", A.EQUIPMENT_RECIPE_NAME "equipmentRecipeName", A.LOT_HOLD_STATE "lotHoldState", A.LOT_HOLD_COUNT "lotHoldCount", A.REASON_CODE
    "reasonCode", A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME "mainProcessFlowName", A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION "mainProcessFlowVersion", A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME
    "mainProcessFlowSeqName", A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME "processFlowName", A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION "processFlowVersion", A.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME
    "processFlowSeqName", A.PROCESS_STEP_NAME "processStepName", A.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION "processStepVersion", A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME
    "retProcessFlowName", A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION "retProcessFlowVersion", A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME "retProcessFlowSeqName", A.SEND_FACTORY_NAME
    "sendFactoryName", A.LOT_CONTAMINATION_LEVEL "lotContaminationLevel", A.WAIT_TIME "waitTime", A.SORTING_ORDER1 "sortingOrder1", A.SORTING_ORDER2
    "sortingOrder2", A.SORTING_ORDER3 "sortingOrder3" FROM ( SELECT A.CARRIER_NAME, A.LOT_NAME, A.PRODUCT_TYPE, A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME,
    A.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION, A.WORK_ORDER_NAME, A.ORIGINAL_LOT_NAME, A.PARENT_LOT_NAME, A.SOURCE_LOT_NAME, A.TARGET_LOT_NAME, A.LOT_TYPE, A.DUE_DATE,
    A.LOT_PRIORITY, A.LOT_STATE, A.PRODUCT_QUANTITY, A.LOT_PROCESS_STATE, A.EQUIPMENT_NAME, A.EQUIPMENT_RECIPE_NAME, A.LOT_HOLD_STATE,
    A.LOT_HOLD_COUNT, A.REASON_CODE, A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME, A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION, A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME, A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME,
    A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION, A.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME, A.PROCESS_STEP_NAME, A.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION, A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME, A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION,
    A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME, A.SEND_FACTORY_NAME, A.LOT_CONTAMINATION_LEVEL, C.SORTING_ORDER SORTING_ORDER1, D.SORTING_ORDER SORTING_ORDER2,
    E.SORTING_ORDER SORTING_ORDER3,
    <choose>
      <when test="_databaseId == 'mysql'">TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, (SELECT F.EVENT_TIME FROM LOT_PROCESS_FLOW F WHERE A.LOT_NAME = F.LOT_NAME), now())
        WAIT_TIME
      </when>
      <when test="_databaseId == 'postgres'">(date_part('day', now()::timestamp - (SELECT F.EVENT_TIME FROM LOT_PROCESS_FLOW F WHERE A.LOT_NAME =
        F.LOT_NAME)::timestamp) * 24 + date_part('hour', now()::timestamp - (SELECT F.EVENT_TIME FROM LOT_PROCESS_FLOW F WHERE A.LOT_NAME =
        F.LOT_NAME)::timestamp)) WAIT_TIME
      </when>
      <otherwise>ROUND(TO_NUMBER(CAST(systimestamp AS DATE ) - CAST((SELECT F.EVENT_TIME FROM LOT_PROCESS_FLOW F WHERE A.LOT_NAME = F.LOT_NAME ) AS
        DATE )) * 24 ) WAIT_TIME
      </otherwise>
    </choose>
    FROM ( SELECT A.CARRIER_NAME, A.LOT_NAME, A.PRODUCT_TYPE, A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME, A.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION, A.WORK_ORDER_NAME, A.ORIGINAL_LOT_NAME,
    A.PARENT_LOT_NAME, A.SOURCE_LOT_NAME, A.TARGET_LOT_NAME, A.LOT_TYPE, A.DUE_DATE, A.LOT_PRIORITY, A.LOT_STATE, A.PRODUCT_QUANTITY,
    A.LOT_PROCESS_STATE, A.EQUIPMENT_NAME, A.EQUIPMENT_RECIPE_NAME, A.LOT_HOLD_STATE, A.LOT_HOLD_COUNT, A.SEND_FACTORY_NAME, A.REASON_CODE,
    B.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME, B.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION, B.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME, B.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME, B.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION,
    B.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME, B.PROCESS_STEP_NAME, B.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION, B.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME, B.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION,
    B.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME, A.LOT_CONTAMINATION_LEVEL FROM
    <trim prefix="(" suffix=")">
      <choose>
        <when
          test="(_parameter.containsKey('lotName') and lotName != null and lotName != '') and (!_parameter.containsKey('carrierName') or carrierName == null or carrierName == '')">
          SELECT DISTINCT L.*,CL.CARRIER_NAME FROM (SELECT DISTINCT CL.CARRIER_NAME, CL.MATERIAL_NAME, P.LOT_NAME FROM PRODUCT P INNER JOIN
          CARRIER_SLOT CL ON CL.MATERIAL_NAME = P.PRODUCT_NAME WHERE P.LOT_NAME = #{lotName} ) A INNER JOIN CARRIER_SLOT CL ON A.CARRIER_NAME =
          CL.CARRIER_NAME INNER JOIN PRODUCT P ON CL.MATERIAL_NAME = P.PRODUCT_NAME RIGHT JOIN LOT L ON L.LOT_NAME = P.LOT_NAME WHERE L.LOT_NAME =
          #{lotName} OR CL.CARRIER_NAME IS NOT NULL
        </when>
        <otherwise>SELECT DISTINCT C.CARRIER_NAME, L.* FROM PRODUCT B INNER JOIN CARRIER_SLOT C ON C.MATERIAL_NAME = B.PRODUCT_NAME RIGHT JOIN LOT L
          ON L.LOT_NAME = B.LOT_NAME
          <where>
            <if test="_parameter.containsKey('carrierName') and carrierName != null and carrierName != ''">AND C.CARRIER_NAME = #{carrierName}</if>
            <if test="_parameter.containsKey('lotName') and lotName != null and lotName != ''">AND B.LOT_NAME = #{lotName}</if>
          </where>
        </otherwise>
      </choose>
    </trim>
    A LEFT JOIN LOT_PROCESS_FLOW B ON A.LOT_NAME = B.LOT_NAME 
    <where>
      <if test="factoryName!=null and factoryName!=''">AND ((A.FACTORY_NAME = #{factoryName} AND A.LOT_STORE_STATE <> 'Sending') OR
        (A.SEND_FACTORY_NAME = #{factoryName} AND A.LOT_STORE_STATE = 'Sending'))
      </if>
      <if test="lotState!=null and lotState!=''">AND A.LOT_STATE = #{lotState}</if>
      <if test="workOrderName!=null and workOrderName!=''">AND A.WORK_ORDER_NAME = #{workOrderName}</if>
      <if test="productDefName!=null and productDefName!=''">AND A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME = #{productDefName}</if>
      <if test="lotPriority!=null">AND A.LOT_PRIORITY = #{lotPriority}</if>
      <if test="lotType!=null and lotType!=''">AND A.LOT_TYPE = #{lotType}</if>
      <if test="lotProcessState!=null and lotProcessState!=''">AND A.LOT_PROCESS_STATE = #{lotProcessState}</if>
      <if test="lotHoldState!=null and lotHoldState!=''">AND A.LOT_HOLD_STATE = #{lotHoldState}</if>
      <if test="processFlowName!=null and processFlowName!=''">AND B.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = #{processFlowName}</if>
    </where>
    ) A LEFT JOIN DICT_ENUM_VALUE C ON A.LOT_STATE = C.ENUM_VALUE AND C.ENUM_TYPE = 'LotState' LEFT JOIN DICT_ENUM_VALUE D ON A.LOT_PROCESS_STATE =
    D.ENUM_VALUE AND D.ENUM_TYPE = 'LotProcessState' LEFT JOIN DICT_ENUM_VALUE E ON A.LOT_HOLD_STATE = E.ENUM_VALUE AND E.ENUM_TYPE = 'LotHoldState' )
    A ORDER BY SORTING_ORDER1 ASC, SORTING_ORDER2 DESC, SORTING_ORDER3 ASC
    <choose>
      <when test="_databaseId == 'mysql'">,IF(ISNULL(A.WAIT_TIME),1,0),A.WAIT_TIME DESC</when>
      <otherwise>,A.WAIT_TIME DESC NULLS LAST</otherwise>
    </choose>
    , A.LOT_NAME ASC

SELECT DISTINCT
    t1.LOT_NAME "lotName",
    t1.LOT_PROCESS_STATE "lotProcessState",
		t1.LOT_HOLD_STATE "lotHoldState",
		t1.PRODUCT_QUANTITY "productQuantity",
    t2.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME "processFlowName",
		t2.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION "processFlowVersion",
		t2.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME "processStepSeq",
		t2.PROCESS_STEP_NAME "processStepName",
		t2.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION "processStepVersion",
    t4.DESCRIPTION "processStepDesc",
    t5.IDX "idx",
    t5.PARENT_LOT_NAME "parentLotName",
    t5.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME "fromProcessFlowName",
		t5.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION "fromProcessFlowVersion",
		t5.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME "fromProcessFlowSeqName",
    t5.LOT_EXP_STATE "lotExpState",
	t6.PROCESS_CAPABILITY_NAME "processCapabilityName",
    t6.EQUIPMENT_NAME "equipmentName",
    t6.EQUIPMENT_RECIPE_NAME "equipmentRecipeName",
    t6.RETICLE_GROUP_NAME "reticleGroupName",
    t6.SKIP_FLAG "skipFlag"
FROM LOT t1 
JOIN LOT_PROCESS_FLOW t2 ON t2.LOT_NAME = t1.LOT_NAME
JOIN PROCESS_FLOW t3 ON t3.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = t2.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME AND ((t3.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = t2.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION AND t2.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION != 'AA') OR (t3.PROCESS_FLOW_STATE = 'Active' AND t2.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = 'AA'))
LEFT JOIN PROCESS_STEP t4 ON t4.PROCESS_STEP_NAME = t2.PROCESS_STEP_NAME AND ((t4.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION = t2.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION AND t2.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION != 'AA') OR (t4.PROCESS_STEP_STATE = 'Active' AND t2.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION = 'AA'))
LEFT JOIN (SELECT LOT_NAME, MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME, MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION, FROM_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME, PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME FROM LOT_PROCESS_FLOW WHERE LOT_NAME = #{lotName}) t7 ON 1 = 1
LEFT JOIN LOT_EXP t5 ON t5.LOT_NAME = t1.LOT_NAME AND t5.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = t7.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME AND t5.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = t7.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION AND (t5.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = t7.FROM_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME OR t5.TO_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = t7.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME)
LEFT JOIN LOT_PROCESS_FLOW_CONTENT t6 ON t6.CHILD_LOT_NAME = t1.LOT_NAME AND t6.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = t2.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME AND t6.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = t2.FROM_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME AND t6.TO_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = t2.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME AND t6.TO_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = t2.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME
WHERE t1.PRODUCT_TYPE != 'NPW'
AND t1.PRODUCT_TYPE NOT LIKE '%_DEVICE'
AND ((t2.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME IS NOT NULL
AND t3.PROCESS_FLOW_TYPE2 = 'Branch') OR t5.LOT_EXP_STATE NOT IN('Cancelled', 'Completed'))
AND t5.IDX = (SELECT CASE WHEN COALESCE(a1.IDX, 1) > COALESCE(a2.IDX, 1) THEN COALESCE(a1.IDX, 1)ELSE COALESCE(a2.IDX, 0) + 1 END idx
	    FROM (SELECT MAX(IDX) AS IDX FROM LOT_EXP WHERE PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = t2.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME AND PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = t2.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION AND (PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = t2.FROM_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME OR TO_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = t2.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME) AND(LOT_NAME = #{lotName} OR PARENT_LOT_NAME = #{lotName}) AND LOT_EXP_STATE != 'Completed') a1,
	    (SELECT MAX(IDX) AS IDX FROM LOT_EXP WHERE PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = t2.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME AND PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = t2.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION AND (PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = t2.FROM_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME OR TO_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = t2.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME) AND (LOT_NAME = #{lotName} OR PARENT_LOT_NAME = #{lotName}) AND LOT_EXP_STATE = 'Completed') a2)
AND (t5.PARENT_LOT_NAME = #{lotName} OR t5.LOT_NAME = #{lotName})

SELECT DISTINCT
    t1.LOT_NAME "lotName",
    t1.LOT_PROCESS_STATE "lotProcessState",
    t1.LOT_HOLD_STATE "lotHoldState",
    t1.PRODUCT_QUANTITY "productQuantity",
    t2.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME "processFlowName",
    t2.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION "processFlowVersion",
    t2.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME "processStepSeq",
    t2.PROCESS_STEP_NAME "processStepName",
    t2.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION "processStepVersion",
    t3.DESCRIPTION "processStepDesc",
    'NotStarted' "lotExpState",
    t4.CARRIER_NAME "carrierName"
FROM LOT t1 
JOIN LOT_PROCESS_FLOW t2 ON t2.LOT_NAME = t1.LOT_NAME
LEFT JOIN PROCESS_STEP t3 ON t3.PROCESS_STEP_NAME = t2.PROCESS_STEP_NAME AND ((t3.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION = t2.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION AND t2.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION != 'AA') OR (t3.PROCESS_STEP_STATE = 'Active' AND t2.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION = 'AA'))
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT t4_1.LOT_NAME, t4_2.CARRIER_NAME FROM PRODUCT t4_1 JOIN CARRIER_SLOT t4_2 ON t4_2.MATERIAL_NAME = t4_1.PRODUCT_NAME) t4 ON t4.LOT_NAME = t1.LOT_NAME
WHERE  EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM LOT_EXP_PLAN t5 WHERE t5.LOT_NAME = t1.LOT_NAME AND t5.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = t2.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME AND t5.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = t2.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION AND t5.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = t2.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME AND t5.LOT_EXP_PLAN_STATE IN ('Created', 'Available')) 
<if test="lotName != null and lotName != ''">                
    AND t1.LOT_NAME = #{lotName}           
</if>
UNION
SELECT DISTINCT
    t1.LOT_NAME "lotName",
    t1.LOT_PROCESS_STATE "lotProcessState",
		t1.LOT_HOLD_STATE "lotHoldState",
		t1.PRODUCT_QUANTITY "productQuantity",
    t2.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME "processFlowName",
		t2.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION "processFlowVersion",
		t2.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME "processStepSeq",
		t2.PROCESS_STEP_NAME "processStepName",
		t2.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION "processStepVersion",
    t4.DESCRIPTION "processStepDesc",
    t5.LOT_EXP_STATE "lotExpState",
    t6.CARRIER_NAME "carrierName"
FROM LOT t1 
JOIN LOT_PROCESS_FLOW t2 ON t2.LOT_NAME = t1.LOT_NAME
JOIN PROCESS_FLOW t3 ON t3.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = t2.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME AND ((t3.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = t2.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION AND t2.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION != 'AA') OR (t3.PROCESS_FLOW_STATE = 'Active' AND t2.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = 'AA'))
LEFT JOIN PROCESS_STEP t4 ON t4.PROCESS_STEP_NAME = t2.PROCESS_STEP_NAME AND ((t4.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION = t2.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION AND t2.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION != 'AA') OR (t4.PROCESS_STEP_STATE = 'Active' AND t2.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION = 'AA'))
LEFT JOIN (SELECT LOT_NAME, PROCESS_FLOW_NAME, PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME, LOT_EXP_STATE FROM (SELECT LOT_NAME, PROCESS_FLOW_NAME, PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME, LOT_EXP_STATE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY LOT_NAME,PROCESS_FLOW_NAME ORDER BY IDX DESC) AS rn FROM LOT_EXP WHERE 1 = 1
<if test="lotName != null and lotName != ''">                
    AND LOT_NAME = #{lotName}           
</if>) t5_1 WHERE rn = 1
) t5 ON t5.LOT_NAME = t1.LOT_NAME AND t5.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = t2.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME AND t5.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = t2.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME
JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT t6_1.LOT_NAME, t6_2.CARRIER_NAME FROM PRODUCT t6_1 JOIN CARRIER_SLOT t6_2 ON t6_2.MATERIAL_NAME = t6_1.PRODUCT_NAME) t6 ON t6.LOT_NAME = t1.LOT_NAME
WHERE t1.PRODUCT_TYPE != 'NPW'
AND t1.PRODUCT_TYPE NOT LIKE '%_DEVICE'
AND ((t2.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME IS NOT NULL AND t3.PROCESS_FLOW_TYPE2 = 'Branch') OR EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM LOT_EXP WHERE (LOT_NAME = t1.LOT_NAME OR PARENT_LOT_NAME = t1.LOT_NAME) AND LOT_EXP_STATE NOT IN('Cancelled', 'Completed')))
<if test="lotName != null and lotName != ''">                
    AND t1.LOT_NAME = #{lotName}           
</if>
<if test="lotExpState != null and lotExpState != ''">                
    AND t5.LOT_EXP_STATE = #{lotExpState}       
</if>

SELECT
  t1.LOT_NAME "lotName",
  t1.LOT_PROCESS_STATE "lotProcessState",
  t1.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME "productDefName",
  t1.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION "productDefVersion",
  t1.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME "processFlowName",
  t1.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION "processFlowVersion",
  t1.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME "processFlowSeqName",
  t1.PROCESS_STEP_NAME "processStepName",
  t1.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION "processStepVersion" 
FROM
  LOT t1
<where>
    AND t1.LOT_STATE = 'Released'
    <if test="productDefName != null and productDefName != ''">
        AND t1.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME = #{productDefName}
    </if>
    <if test="productDefVersion != null and productDefVersion != ''">
        AND t1.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION =
        <choose>
            <when test="productDefVersion == 'AA'">
                (SELECT PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION FROM PRODUCT_DEF WHERE PRODUCT_DEF_NAME = #{productDefName} AND PRODUCT_DEF_STATE = 'Active')
            </when>
            <otherwise>
                #{productDefVersion}
            </otherwise>
        </choose>
    </if>
    <if test="lotName != null and lotName != ''">
        AND t1.LOT_NAME = #{lotName}
    </if>
	<if test="lotStoreState != null and lotStoreState != ''">
        AND t1.LOT_STORE_STATE = #{lotStoreState}
        AND t1.PRODUCT_TYPE NOT LIKE '%_DEVICE' AND t1.PRODUCT_TYPE != 'NPW'
    </if>
    <if test="lotProcessState != null and lotProcessState != ''">
        AND t1.LOT_PROCESS_STATE IN 
        (
         SELECT REGEXP_SUBSTR(#{lotProcessState}, '[^,]+', 1, LEVEL) 
   			 FROM dual 
   		 CONNECT BY REGEXP_SUBSTR(#{lotProcessState}, '[^,]+', 1, LEVEL) IS NOT NULL
        
        )
    </if>
</where>

SELECT
        A.ID AS "id",
        A.lot_name AS "lotName",
        A.lot_type AS "lotType",
        A.lot_priority AS "lotPriority",
        A.lot_state AS "lotState",
        A.lot_process_state AS "lotProcessState",
        A.lot_store_state AS "lotStoreState",
        A.lot_hold_state AS "lotHoldState",
        A.lot_hold_count AS "lotHoldCount",
        A.reason_code AS "reasonCode",
        A.product_def_name AS "productDefName",
        A.product_def_version AS "productDefVersion",
        A.product_type AS "productType",
        A.PRODUCTION_TYPE AS "productionType",
        A.product_quantity AS "productQuantity",
        <choose>
          <when test="_databaseId == 'mysql'">
            TIME_FORMAT(A.due_date, '%Y-%m-%d')
          </when>
          <otherwise>
            to_char(A.due_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
          </otherwise>
        </choose> AS "dueDate",
        A.equipment_name AS "equipmentName",
        A.equipment_recipe_name AS "equipmentRecipeName",
        A.area_name AS "areaName",
        A.work_order_name AS "workOrderName",
        (SELECT work_order_type
           FROM work_order w
          WHERE w.work_order_name = A.work_order_name) AS "workOrderType",
        A.factory_name AS "factoryName",
        A.send_factory_name AS "sendFactoryName",
        A.event_name AS "eventName",
        A.event_user AS "eventUser",
        A.event_comment AS "eventComment",
        A.event_time AS "eventTime",
        A.NPW_DOWNGRADE_PATH AS "npwDowngradePath",
        b.main_process_flow_name AS "mainProcessFlowName",
        b.main_process_flow_version AS "mainProcessFlowVersion",
        b.main_process_flow_seq_name AS "mainProcessFlowSeqName",
        b.process_flow_name AS "processFlowName",
        b.process_flow_version AS "processFlowVersion",
        b.process_flow_seq_name AS "processFlowSeqName",
        b.process_step_name AS "processStepName",
        b.process_step_version AS "processStepVersion",
        (SELECT process_step_type
           FROM process_step
          WHERE process_step_name = b.process_step_name
            AND (process_step_version = b.process_step_version OR process_step_version = 'AA')
        ) AS "processStepType",
        b.ret_process_flow_name AS "retProcessFlowName",
        b.ret_process_flow_version AS "retProcessFlowVersion",
        b.ret_process_flow_seq_name AS "retProcessFlowSeqName",
        A.lot_contamination_level AS "lotContaminationLevel",
        (SELECT label
           FROM dict_enum_value
          WHERE enum_type = 'ContaminationLevel'
            AND enum_value = A.lot_contamination_level || ''
        ) AS "contaminationLabel",
        (SELECT pj.PROCESS_JOB_NAME
           FROM PROCESS_JOB pj
           JOIN PROCESS_JOB_LOT pjl ON pj.PROCESS_JOB_NAME = pjl.PROCESS_JOB_NAME
           JOIN LOT l ON l.LOT_NAME = pjl.LOT_NAME
          WHERE pj.process_job_state IN ('Created', 'Queued', 'Executing')
            AND l.LOT_NAME = #{lotName}
        ) AS "batchId",
        (CASE
           WHEN INSTR(D.reticle_group_name, '$') > 0 THEN
             (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE
                FROM PRODUCT_DEF_PF_PARAMETER Z
               WHERE Z.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME = A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME
                 AND PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION = A.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION
                 AND PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = b.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME
                 AND PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = b.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION
                 AND PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = b.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME
                 AND PARAMETER_NAME = REPLACE(D.reticle_group_name, '$', '')
             )
           ELSE D.reticle_group_name
         END) AS "reticleGroupName",
        (CASE
           WHEN INSTR(D.probe_card_name, '$') > 0 THEN
             (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE
                FROM PRODUCT_DEF_PF_PARAMETER Z
               WHERE Z.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME = A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME
                 AND PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION = A.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION
                 AND PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = b.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME
                 AND PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = b.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION
                 AND PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = b.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME
                 AND PARAMETER_NAME = REPLACE(D.probe_card_name, '$', '')
             )
           ELSE D.probe_card_name
         END) AS "probeCardName",
        (CASE
           WHEN INSTR(D.recipe_name, '$') > 0 THEN
             (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE
                FROM PRODUCT_DEF_PF_PARAMETER Z
               WHERE Z.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME = A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME
                 AND PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION = A.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION
                 AND PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = b.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME
                 AND PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = b.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION
                 AND PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = b.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME
                 AND PARAMETER_NAME = REPLACE(D.recipe_name, '$', '')
             )
           ELSE D.recipe_name
         END) AS "recipeName",
        (SELECT RAW_LOT_NAME
           FROM product
          WHERE lot_name = a.lot_name
            AND rownum = 1) AS "rawLotName",
        (SELECT carrier_name
           FROM carrier_slot
          WHERE MATERIAL_NAME = (
            SELECT PRODUCT_NAME
              FROM product
             WHERE lot_name = a.lot_name
               AND rownum = 1
          )
        ) AS "carrireName",
        (SELECT carrier_type
           FROM carrier
          WHERE carrier_name = (
            SELECT carrier_name
              FROM carrier_slot
             WHERE MATERIAL_NAME = (
               SELECT PRODUCT_NAME
                 FROM product
                WHERE lot_name = a.lot_name
                  AND rownum = 1
             )
          )
        ) AS "carrireType",
        (SELECT carrier_def_name
           FROM carrier
          WHERE carrier_name = (
            SELECT carrier_name
              FROM carrier_slot
             WHERE MATERIAL_NAME = (
               SELECT PRODUCT_NAME
                 FROM product
                WHERE lot_name = a.lot_name
                  AND rownum = 1
             )
          )
        ) AS "carrireDefName",
        (SELECT * FROM (
           SELECT lh.EVENT_COMMENT
             FROM LOT_HISTORY lh
            WHERE lh.lot_name = a.lot_name
              AND lh.EVENT_COMMENT IS NOT NULL
            ORDER BY lh.EVENT_TIME DESC
         ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1) AS "lastEventComment",
        A.RELEASE_TIME AS "releaseTime"
      FROM (
        SELECT A.*, pd.PRODUCTION_TYPE
          FROM lot A, PRODUCT_DEF pd
         WHERE A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME = pd.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME
           AND A.lot_name = #{lotName}
           AND (
             (A.lot_store_state = 'Sending' AND A.send_factory_name = #{factoryName})
             OR (A.lot_store_state != 'Sending' AND A.factory_name = #{factoryName})
           )
      ) A
      LEFT JOIN lot b ON A.lot_name = b.lot_name
      LEFT JOIN process_flow_content d
        ON b.process_flow_name = d.process_flow_name
       AND b.process_flow_version = d.process_flow_version
       AND b.process_flow_seq_name = d.process_flow_seq_name

SELECT
  A.EVENT_TIME "eventTime", A.CARRIER_NAME "carrierName",
  A.LOT_NAME "lotName", A.PRODUCT_TYPE "productType",
  A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME "productDefName", A.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION "productDefVersion",
  A.WORK_ORDER_NAME "workOrderName", A.ORIGINAL_LOT_NAME "originalLotName",
  A.PARENT_LOT_NAME "parentLotName", A.SOURCE_LOT_NAME "sourceLotName",
  A.TARGET_LOT_NAME "targetLotName", A.LOT_TYPE "lotType",
  <choose>
    <when test="_databaseId == 'mysql'">TIME_FORMAT ( A.due_date, '%Y-%M-%D' ) </when>
    <otherwise>to_char( A.due_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD' ) </otherwise>
  </choose> AS "dueDate", A.LOT_PRIORITY "lotPriority", A.LOT_STATE "lotState",
  A.PRODUCT_QUANTITY "productQuantity", A.LOT_PROCESS_STATE "lotProcessState",
  A.EQUIPMENT_NAME "equipmentName", A.EQUIPMENT_RECIPE_NAME "equipmentRecipeName",
  A.LOT_HOLD_STATE "lotHoldState", A.LOT_HOLD_COUNT "lotHoldCount",
  A.REASON_CODE "reasonCode", A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME "mainProcessFlowName",
  A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION "mainProcessFlowVersion",
  A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME "mainProcessFlowSeqName",
  A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME "processFlowName", A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION "processFlowVersion",
  A.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME "processFlowSeqName", A.PROCESS_STEP_NAME "processStepName",
  A.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION "processStepVersion", A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME "retProcessFlowName",
  A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION "retProcessFlowVersion", A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME "retProcessFlowSeqName",
  A.SEND_FACTORY_NAME "sendFactoryName", A.WAIT_TIME "waitTime", A.SORTING_ORDER1 "sortingOrder1",
  A.SORTING_ORDER2 "sortingOrder2", A.SORTING_ORDER3 "sortingOrder3",
  A.LOT_CONTAMINATION_LEVEL "lotContaminationLevel", A.PROCESS_STAGE_NAME "processStageName",
  A.STEP_DESC "stepDesc", A.PROCESS_JOB_NAME "batchId", A.PRODUCTION_TYPE "productionType",
  A.RELEASE_TIME "releaseTime",
  (
    CASE WHEN INSTR( A.DC_SPEC_NAME , '$') > 0 THEN (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM PRODUCT_DEF_PF_PARAMETER Z WHERE Z.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME = A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME AND PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION = A.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION AND PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME AND PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION AND PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME AND PARAMETER_NAME = REPLACE(A.DC_SPEC_NAME, '$', '') )
    ELSE A.DC_SPEC_NAME END ) AS "dcSpecName", ( CASE WHEN INSTR( A.RETICLE_GROUP_NAME , '$') > 0 THEN (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM PRODUCT_DEF_PF_PARAMETER Z WHERE Z.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME = A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME AND PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION = A.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION AND PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME AND PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION AND PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME AND PARAMETER_NAME = REPLACE(A.RETICLE_GROUP_NAME, '$', '') ) ELSE A.RETICLE_GROUP_NAME END ) AS "reticleGroupName",
  ( CASE WHEN INSTR( A.PROBE_CARD_NAME , '$') > 0 THEN (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM PRODUCT_DEF_PF_PARAMETER Z WHERE Z.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME = A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME AND PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION = A.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION AND PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME AND PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION AND PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME AND PARAMETER_NAME = REPLACE(A.PROBE_CARD_NAME, '$', '') )
    ELSE A.PROBE_CARD_NAME END ) AS "probeCardName",
  ( CASE WHEN INSTR( A.RECIPE_NAME , '$') > 0 THEN (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM PRODUCT_DEF_PF_PARAMETER Z WHERE Z.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME = A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME AND PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION = A.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION AND PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME AND PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION AND PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME AND PARAMETER_NAME = REPLACE(A.RECIPE_NAME, '$', '') )
    ELSE A.RECIPE_NAME END ) AS "recipeName"
FROM (
  SELECT
    A.EVENT_TIME, A.CARRIER_NAME, A.LOT_NAME,
    A.PRODUCT_TYPE, A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME,
    A.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION, A.WORK_ORDER_NAME,
    A.ORIGINAL_LOT_NAME, A.PARENT_LOT_NAME,
    A.SOURCE_LOT_NAME, A.TARGET_LOT_NAME,
    A.LOT_TYPE, A.DUE_DATE, A.LOT_PRIORITY,
    A.LOT_STATE, A.PRODUCT_QUANTITY, A.LOT_PROCESS_STATE,
    A.EQUIPMENT_NAME, A.EQUIPMENT_RECIPE_NAME,
    A.LOT_HOLD_STATE, A.LOT_HOLD_COUNT, A.REASON_CODE,
    A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME, A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION,
    A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME, A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME,
    A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION, A.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME, A.PROCESS_STEP_NAME,
    A.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION, A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME,
    A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION, A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME,
    A.SEND_FACTORY_NAME, A.LOT_CONTAMINATION_LEVEL, A.PROCESS_STAGE_NAME,
    A.DC_SPEC_NAME, A.RECIPE_NAME, A.RETICLE_GROUP_NAME,
    A.PROBE_CARD_NAME, A.STEP_DESC, A.PROCESS_JOB_NAME, A.PRODUCTION_TYPE,
    C.SORTING_ORDER SORTING_ORDER1, D.SORTING_ORDER SORTING_ORDER2,
    E.SORTING_ORDER SORTING_ORDER3, A.RELEASE_TIME,
    <choose>
      <when test="_databaseId == 'mysql'"> TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, A.PROCESS_FLOW_EVENT_TIME, now()) WAIT_TIME </when>
      <when test="_databaseId == 'postgres'"> (date_part('day', now()::timestamp - A.PROCESS_FLOW_EVENT_TIME::timestamp) * 24 + date_part('hour', now()::timestamp - A.PROCESS_FLOW_EVENT_TIME::timestamp)) WAIT_TIME </when>
      <otherwise> ROUND(TO_NUMBER(CAST(systimestamp AS DATE ) - CAST(A.PROCESS_FLOW_EVENT_TIME AS DATE )) * 24 ) WAIT_TIME </otherwise> </choose>
  FROM (
    SELECT
      A.EVENT_TIME, A.CARRIER_NAME, A.LOT_NAME,
      A.PRODUCT_TYPE, A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME, A.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION,
      A.WORK_ORDER_NAME, A.ORIGINAL_LOT_NAME, A.PARENT_LOT_NAME,
      A.SOURCE_LOT_NAME, A.TARGET_LOT_NAME, A.LOT_TYPE,
      A.DUE_DATE, A.LOT_PRIORITY, A.LOT_STATE, A.PRODUCT_QUANTITY,
      A.LOT_PROCESS_STATE, A.EQUIPMENT_NAME, A.EQUIPMENT_RECIPE_NAME,
      A.LOT_HOLD_STATE, A.LOT_HOLD_COUNT, A.SEND_FACTORY_NAME, A.REASON_CODE,
      A.PRODUCTION_TYPE, A.RELEASE_TIME, A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME,
      A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION, A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME,
      A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME, A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION, A.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME,
      A.PROCESS_STEP_NAME, A.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION, A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME,
      A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION, A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME,
      A.EVENT_TIME as PROCESS_FLOW_EVENT_TIME, A.LOT_CONTAMINATION_LEVEL,
      PS.PROCESS_STAGE_NAME, PS.DESCRIPTION AS STEP_DESC, PJL.PROCESS_JOB_NAME,
      PFC.DC_SPEC_NAME, PFC.RECIPE_NAME, PFC.RETICLE_GROUP_NAME,
      PFC.PROBE_CARD_NAME
    FROM
      <trim prefix="(" suffix=")">
        SELECT
          DISTINCT L.*,
          PD.PRODUCTION_TYPE
        FROM
          LOT L
        LEFT JOIN
          PRODUCT_DEF PD ON L.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME =PD.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME and PD.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION = L.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION
        <where>
          <if test="_parameter.containsKey('carrierName') and carrierName != null and carrierName != ''"> AND L.CARRIER_NAME = #{carrierName} </if>
          <if test="_parameter.containsKey('lotName') and lotName != null and lotName != ''"> AND L.LOT_NAME = #{lotName} </if>
          <if test="lotNpwState != null and lotNpwState != ''"> AND L.LOT_NPW_STATE = #{lotNpwState} </if>
        </where>
      </trim> A
    LEFT JOIN PROCESS_FLOW PF ON PF.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME AND ((PF.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION) OR (A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = 'AA' AND PF.PROCESS_FLOW_STATE = 'Active'))
    LEFT JOIN PROCESS_FLOW_CONTENT PFC ON ( A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = PFC.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME AND PF.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = PFC.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION AND A.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = PFC.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME)
    LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT PROCESS_STEP_NAME,PROCESS_STEP_VERSION, PROCESS_STAGE_NAME,DESCRIPTION FROM PROCESS_STEP) PS ON PS.PROCESS_STEP_NAME = A.PROCESS_STEP_NAME AND PS.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION = A.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION
    left join (select pjl.* from process_job pj inner join process_job_lot pjl on pj.process_job_name = pjl.process_job_name and pj.process_job_state in ('Created','Queued','Executing')) pjl on pjl.lot_name = A.lot_name
    <where>
      A.PRODUCT_TYPE = 'NPW' AND ((A.FACTORY_NAME = #{factoryName} AND A.LOT_STORE_STATE <> 'Sending') OR (A.SEND_FACTORY_NAME = #{factoryName}
      AND A.LOT_STORE_STATE = 'Sending')) AND (A.LOT_STATE IN ('Created','Released','Emptied') OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM PRODUCT WHERE LOT_NAME != PRODUCT_NAME and A.LOT_NAME = LOT_NAME))
      <if test="lotState!=null and lotState!=''"> AND A.LOT_STATE = #{lotState} </if>
      <if test="workOrderName!=null and workOrderName!=''"> AND A.WORK_ORDER_NAME = #{workOrderName} </if>
      <if test="productDefName!=null and productDefName!=''"> AND A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME = #{productDefName} </if>
      <if test="lotPriority!=null"> AND A.LOT_PRIORITY = #{lotPriority} </if>
      <if test="lotType!=null and lotType!=''"> AND A.LOT_TYPE = #{lotType} </if>
      <if test="lotProcessState!=null and lotProcessState!=''"> AND A.LOT_PROCESS_STATE = #{lotProcessState} </if>
      <if test="lotHoldState!=null and lotHoldState!=''"> AND A.LOT_HOLD_STATE = #{lotHoldState} </if>
      <if test="processFlowName!=null and processFlowName!=''"> AND A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = #{processFlowName} </if>
      <if test="controlPlanName != null and controlPlanName != ''">
        AND A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME = (
          SELECT PRODUCT_DEF_NAME
          FROM NPW_CONTROL_PLAN
          WHERE CONTROL_PLAN_NAME = #{controlPlanName}
        )
        </if>
      <if test="controlTaskName != null and controlTaskName != ''">
         AND A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME = (
          SELECT PRODUCT_DEF_NAME
          FROM NPW_CONTROL_TASK
          WHERE CONTROL_TASK_NAME = #{controlTaskName}
         )
      </if>
      <if test = "startTime!=null and startTime!='' and lotState!=null and lotState!=''"> AND A.LOT_STATE = #{lotState}
        <if test = "lotState=='Completed'"> AND A.EVENT_NAME = 'Complete' </if>
        <if test = "lotState=='Shipped'"> AND A.EVENT_NAME = 'Ship' </if>
        AND A.EVENT_TIME >= TO_DATE(#{startTime},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
      </if>
      <if test = "endTime!=null and endTime!='' and lotState!=null and lotState!=''"> AND A.LOT_STATE = #{lotState}
        <if test = "lotState=='Completed'"> AND A.EVENT_NAME = 'Complete' </if>

        AND A.EVENT_TIME <= TO_DATE(#{endTime},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
      </if>
    </where> ) A
  LEFT JOIN DICT_ENUM_VALUE C ON A.LOT_STATE = C.ENUM_VALUE AND C.ENUM_TYPE = 'LotState'
  LEFT JOIN DICT_ENUM_VALUE D ON A.LOT_PROCESS_STATE = D.ENUM_VALUE AND D.ENUM_TYPE = 'LotProcessState'
  LEFT JOIN DICT_ENUM_VALUE E ON A.LOT_HOLD_STATE = E.ENUM_VALUE AND E.ENUM_TYPE = 'LotHoldState'
  ) A
  ORDER BY SORTING_ORDER1 ASC,
  SORTING_ORDER2 DESC,
  SORTING_ORDER3 ASC
  <choose>
    <when test="_databaseId == 'mysql'"> ,IF(ISNULL(A.WAIT_TIME),1,0),A.WAIT_TIME DESC </when>
    <otherwise> ,A.WAIT_TIME DESC NULLS LAST </otherwise>
  </choose> ,

SELECT

	A.LOT_NPW_STATE AS "lotNpwState", A.EQUIPMENT_NAME AS "equipmentName", 
	A.EQUIPMENT_RECIPE_NAME AS "equipmentRecipeName", A.LOT_HOLD_STATE AS "lotHoldState", 
	A.LOT_HOLD_COUNT AS "lotHoldCount", A.REASON_CODE AS "reasonCode", 
	A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME AS "mainProcessFlowName", A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION AS "mainProcessFlowVersion", 
	A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME AS "mainProcessFlowSeqName", A.DESCRIPTION AS "processFlowDesc", 
	A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME AS "processFlowName", 
	A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION AS "processFlowVersion", A.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME AS "processFlowSeqName", 
	A.PROCESS_STEP_NAME AS "processStepName", A.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION AS "processStepVersion", 
	A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME AS "retProcessFlowName", A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION AS "retProcessFlowVersion", 
	A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME AS "retProcessFlowSeqName", A.AREA_NAME AS "areaName", 
	A.RELEASE_TIME AS "releaseTime", A.SEND_FACTORY_NAME AS "sendFactoryName", 
	A.WAIT_TIME AS "waitTime", A.SORTING_ORDER1 AS "sortingOrder1", A.SORTING_ORDER2 AS "sortingOrder2", 
	A.SORTING_ORDER3 AS "sortingOrder3", A.LOT_CONTAMINATION_LEVEL AS "lotContaminationLevel", 
	A.PROCESS_STAGE_NAME AS "processStageName", A.PROCESS_GROUP2 AS "processGroup2", A.STEP_DESC AS "stepDesc", 
	A.PROCESS_JOB_NAME AS "batchId", A.PRODUCTION_TYPE AS "productionType", A.QTIME_REMAIN AS "qtimeRemain", 
	CASE WHEN INSTR(A.DC_SPEC_NAME, '$') > 0 THEN ( 
		SELECT 
			PARAMETER_VALUE

			PRODUCT_DEF_PF_PARAMETER Z

			Z.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME = A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME 
			AND PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION = A.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION 
			AND PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME 
			AND PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION 
			AND PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME 
			AND PARAMETER_NAME = REPLACE(A.DC_SPEC_NAME, '$', '') ) 
	ELSE A.DC_SPEC_NAME END AS "dcSpecName", 
	CASE WHEN INSTR(A.RETICLE_GROUP_NAME, '$') > 0 THEN ( 
		SELECT 
			PARAMETER_VALUE 
		FROM 
			PRODUCT_DEF_PF_PARAMETER Z 
		WHERE 
			Z.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME = A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME 
			AND PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION = A.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION 
			AND PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME 
			AND PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION 
			AND PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME 
			AND PARAMETER_NAME = REPLACE(A.RETICLE_GROUP_NAME, '$', '') ) 
	ELSE A.RETICLE_GROUP_NAME END AS "reticleGroupName", 
	CASE WHEN INSTR(A.PROBE_CARD_NAME, '$') > 0 THEN ( 
		SELECT 
			PARAMETER_VALUE 
		FROM 
			PRODUCT_DEF_PF_PARAMETER Z 
		WHERE 
			Z.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME = A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME 
			AND PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION = A.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION 
			AND PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME 
			AND PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION 
			AND PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME 
			AND PARAMETER_NAME = REPLACE(A.PROBE_CARD_NAME, '$', '') ) 
	ELSE A.PROBE_CARD_NAME END AS "probeCardName", 
	CASE WHEN INSTR(A.RECIPE_NAME, '$') > 0 THEN ( 
		SELECT 
			PARAMETER_VALUE 
		FROM 
			PRODUCT_DEF_PF_PARAMETER Z 
		WHERE 
			Z.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME = A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME 
			AND PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION = A.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION 
			AND PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME 
			AND PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION 
			AND PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME 
			AND PARAMETER_NAME = REPLACE(A.RECIPE_NAME, '$', '') ) 
	ELSE A.RECIPE_NAME END AS "recipeName" 
FROM ( 
	SELECT 
		A.EVENT_TIME, A.CARRIER_NAME, A.LOT_NAME, 
		A.PRODUCT_TYPE, A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME, 
		A.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION, A.PRODUCT_DEF_DESC, 
		A.WORK_ORDER_NAME, A.ORIGINAL_LOT_NAME, 
		A.PARENT_LOT_NAME, A.SOURCE_LOT_NAME, 
		A.TARGET_LOT_NAME, A.LOT_TYPE, A.AREA_NAME, 
		A.RELEASE_TIME, A.DUE_DATE, 
		A.LOT_PRIORITY, A.LOT_STATE, 
		A.LOT_NPW_STATE, A.PRODUCT_QUANTITY, 
		A.SCRAPQTY, A.LOT_PROCESS_STATE, 
		A.EQUIPMENT_NAME, A.EQUIPMENT_RECIPE_NAME, 
		A.LOT_HOLD_STATE, A.LOT_HOLD_COUNT, A.REASON_CODE, 
		A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME, A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION, A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME, 
		A.DESCRIPTION, A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME, A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION, A.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME, 
		A.PROCESS_STEP_NAME, A.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION, A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME, 
		A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION, A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME, A.SEND_FACTORY_NAME, 
		A.LOT_CONTAMINATION_LEVEL, A.PROCESS_STAGE_NAME, A.PROCESS_GROUP2, A.DC_SPEC_NAME, 
		A.RECIPE_NAME, A.RETICLE_GROUP_NAME, A.PROBE_CARD_NAME, A.STEP_DESC, A.PROCESS_JOB_NAME, 
		A.PRODUCTION_TYPE, A.QTIME_REMAIN, C.SORTING_ORDER AS SORTING_ORDER1, 
		D.SORTING_ORDER AS SORTING_ORDER2, E.SORTING_ORDER AS SORTING_ORDER3, 
		<choose> 
			<when test="_databaseId == 'mysql'">TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, A.PROCESS_FLOW_EVENT_TIME, NOW())</when> 
			<when test="_databaseId == 'postgres'">(DATE_PART('day', NOW()::timestamp - A.PROCESS_FLOW_EVENT_TIME::timestamp) * 24 + DATE_PART('hour', NOW()::timestamp - A.PROCESS_FLOW_EVENT_TIME::timestamp)) </when> 
			<otherwise>ROUND(TO_NUMBER(CAST(SYSTIMESTAMP AS DATE) - CAST(A.PROCESS_FLOW_EVENT_TIME AS DATE)) * 24) </otherwise> 
		</choose> AS WAIT_TIME 
	FROM ( 
		SELECT 
			A.EVENT_TIME, A.CARRIER_NAME, A.LOT_NAME, 
			A.PRODUCT_TYPE, A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME, 
			A.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION, A.PRODUCT_DEF_DESC, 
			A.WORK_ORDER_NAME, A.ORIGINAL_LOT_NAME, 
			A.PARENT_LOT_NAME, A.SOURCE_LOT_NAME, A.TARGET_LOT_NAME, 
			A.LOT_TYPE, A.DUE_DATE, A.LOT_PRIORITY, A.LOT_STATE, 
			A.PRODUCT_QUANTITY, A.SCRAPQTY, A.LOT_PROCESS_STATE, 
			A.EQUIPMENT_NAME, A.EQUIPMENT_RECIPE_NAME, A.LOT_HOLD_STATE, 
			A.LOT_HOLD_COUNT, A.AREA_NAME, A.RELEASE_TIME, A.SEND_FACTORY_NAME, 
			A.REASON_CODE, A.PRODUCTION_TYPE, A.LOT_NPW_STATE, A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME, 
			A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION, A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME, PF.DESCRIPTION, A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME, 
			A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION, A.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME, A.PROCESS_STEP_NAME, 
			A.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION, A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME, A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION, 
			A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME, A.EVENT_TIME AS PROCESS_FLOW_EVENT_TIME, 
			A.LOT_CONTAMINATION_LEVEL, PS.PROCESS_STAGE_NAME, PS.PROCESS_GROUP2, 
			PS.DESCRIPTION AS STEP_DESC, PJL.PROCESS_JOB_NAME, PFC.DC_SPEC_NAME, 
			PFC.RECIPE_NAME, PFC.RETICLE_GROUP_NAME, PFC.PROBE_CARD_NAME, 
			MIN(ROUND( (LQT.QUEUE_TIME_LIMIT - TO_NUMBER(CAST(SYSTIMESTAMP AS DATE) - CAST(LQT.ENTER_TIME AS DATE)) * 24 * 60 ) / 60, 1 )) AS QTIME_REMAIN 
		FROM <trim prefix="(" suffix=")"> 
			SELECT 
				DISTINCT L.*, 
				PD.PRODUCTION_TYPE, 
				PD.DESCRIPTION AS PRODUCT_DEF_DESC, 
				CASE WHEN L.LOT_STATE <> 'Scrapped' THEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PRODUCT WHERE LOT_NAME = L.LOT_NAME AND PRODUCT_STATE = 'Scrapped') 
				ELSE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PRODUCT WHERE LOT_NAME = L.LOT_NAME) END AS SCRAPQTY 
			FROM 
				LOT L
			LEFT JOIN PRODUCT_DEF PD ON L.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME = PD.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME AND L.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION = PD.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION
			<where> 
				<if test="_parameter.containsKey('lotName') and lotName != null and lotName != ''"> AND L.LOT_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', CONCAT(#{lotName}, '%')) </if> 
			</where> </trim> A 
LEFT JOIN LOT_QUEUE_TIME LQT ON (A.LOT_NAME = LQT.LOT_NAME AND LQT.QUEUE_TIME_STATE IN ('Entered') AND LQT.EXIT_TIME IS NULL) 
LEFT JOIN PROCESS_FLOW PF ON PF.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME 
	AND ( (PF.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION) OR (A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = 'AA' AND PF.PROCESS_FLOW_STATE = 'Active') ) 
LEFT JOIN PROCESS_FLOW_CONTENT PFC ON ( A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = PFC.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME AND PF.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = PFC.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION AND A.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = PFC.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME) 
LEFT JOIN  PROCESS_STEP  PS ON PS.PROCESS_STEP_NAME = A.PROCESS_STEP_NAME AND (( PS.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION = A.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION ) OR ( A.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION = 'AA' AND PS.PROCESS_STEP_STATE = 'Active' ))
LEFT JOIN ( 
	SELECT 
		PJL.* 
	FROM 
		PROCESS_JOB PJ 
	INNER JOIN 
		PROCESS_JOB_LOT PJL ON PJ.PROCESS_JOB_NAME = PJL.PROCESS_JOB_NAME AND PJ.PROCESS_JOB_STATE IN ('Created','Queued','Executing') ) PJL ON PJL.LOT_NAME = A.LOT_NAME 
	<where>
	A.PRODUCT_TYPE = 'NPW' AND ( (A.FACTORY_NAME = #{factoryName} AND A.LOT_STORE_STATE <> 'Sending') OR (A.SEND_FACTORY_NAME = #{factoryName} AND A.LOT_STORE_STATE = 'Sending') ) AND (A.LOT_STATE = 'Created' OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM PRODUCT WHERE LOT_NAME != PRODUCT_NAME AND A.LOT_NAME = LOT_NAME ) ) 
	<if test="processGroup2 != null and processGroup2 != ''">AND PS.PROCESS_GROUP2 = #{processGroup2} </if> <if test="processStageName != null and processStageName != ''">AND PS.PROCESS_STAGE_NAME = #{processStageName} </if> <if test="lotState != null and lotState != ''">AND A.LOT_STATE = #{lotState}</if> <if test="areaName != null and areaName != ''">AND A.AREA_NAME = #{areaName}</if> 
	<if test="workOrderName != null and workOrderName != ''">AND A.WORK_ORDER_NAME = #{workOrderName}</if> 
	<if test="productDefName != null and productDefName != ''">AND A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME = #{productDefName}</if> 
	<if test="lotPriority != null">AND A.LOT_PRIORITY = #{lotPriority}</if> <if test="lotType != null and lotType != ''">AND A.LOT_TYPE = #{lotType}</if> 
	<if test="lotProcessState != null and lotProcessState != ''">AND A.LOT_PROCESS_STATE = #{lotProcessState} </if> 
	<if test="lotHoldState != null and lotHoldState != ''">AND A.LOT_HOLD_STATE = #{lotHoldState}</if> 
	<if test="processFlowName != null and processFlowName != ''">AND A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = #{processFlowName} </if> 
	<if test="lotNpwState != null and lotNpwState != ''">AND A.LOT_NPW_STATE = #{lotNpwState}</if> 
	<if test="equipmentName != null and equipmentName != ''">AND A.EQUIPMENT_NAME = #{equipmentName}</if> 
	</where> 
	GROUP BY A.EVENT_TIME, A.CARRIER_NAME, A.LOT_NAME, 
	A.PRODUCT_TYPE, A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME,A.PRODUCT_DEF_DESC, 
	A.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION, A.WORK_ORDER_NAME, A.ORIGINAL_LOT_NAME, 
	A.PARENT_LOT_NAME, A.SOURCE_LOT_NAME, A.TARGET_LOT_NAME, A.LOT_TYPE, 
	A.DUE_DATE, A.LOT_PRIORITY, A.LOT_STATE, A.PRODUCT_QUANTITY, A.SCRAPQTY, A.LOT_PROCESS_STATE, 
	A.EQUIPMENT_NAME, A.EQUIPMENT_RECIPE_NAME, A.LOT_HOLD_STATE, A.LOT_HOLD_COUNT, A.AREA_NAME, 
	A.RELEASE_TIME, A.SEND_FACTORY_NAME, A.REASON_CODE, A.PRODUCTION_TYPE, A.LOT_NPW_STATE, 
	A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME, A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION, A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME, 
	PF.DESCRIPTION, A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME, A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION, A.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME, 
	A.PROCESS_STEP_NAME, A.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION, A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME, A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION, 
	A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME, A.EVENT_TIME, A.LOT_CONTAMINATION_LEVEL, PS.PROCESS_STAGE_NAME, 
	PS.PROCESS_GROUP2, PS.DESCRIPTION, PJL.PROCESS_JOB_NAME, PFC.DC_SPEC_NAME, PFC.RECIPE_NAME, 
	PFC.RETICLE_GROUP_NAME, PFC.PROBE_CARD_NAME ) A 
	LEFT JOIN DICT_ENUM_VALUE C ON A.LOT_STATE = C.ENUM_VALUE AND C.ENUM_TYPE = 'LotState' 
	LEFT JOIN DICT_ENUM_VALUE D ON A.LOT_PROCESS_STATE = D.ENUM_VALUE AND D.ENUM_TYPE = 'LotProcessState' 
	LEFT JOIN DICT_ENUM_VALUE E ON A.LOT_HOLD_STATE = E.ENUM_VALUE AND E.ENUM_TYPE = 'LotHoldState' ) A 
	ORDER BY SORTING_ORDER1 ASC, SORTING_ORDER2 DESC, A.LOT_PRIORITY ASC, SORTING_ORDER3 ASC, 
	<choose> 
	<when test="_databaseId == 'mysql'">IF(ISNULL(A.WAIT_TIME), 1, 0), A.WAIT_TIME DESC,</when> 
	<otherwise>A.WAIT_TIME DESC NULLS LAST,</otherwise> </choose> A.LOT_NAME ASC

SELECT 
	A.ID "id", 
	A.lot_name "lotName", 
	A.lot_type "lotType", 
	A.lot_priority "lotPriority", 
	A.lot_state "lotState", 
	A.lot_process_state "lotProcessState", 
	A.lot_store_state "lotStoreState", 
	A.lot_hold_state "lotHoldState", 
	A.lot_hold_count "lotHoldCount", 
	A.reason_code "reasonCode", 
	A.product_def_name "productDefName", 
	A.product_def_version "productDefVersion", 
	A.product_type "productType", 
	A.PRODUCTION_TYPE "productionType" , 
	A.product_quantity "productQuantity", 
	A.AGING_PRODUCTION_TYPE "agingProductionType", 
	<choose> 
		<WHEN test = "_databaseId == 'mysql'">TIME_FORMAT ( A.due_date, '%Y-%M-%D' ) </WHEN> 
		<otherwise>to_char( A.due_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD' ) </otherwise> 
	</choose> AS "dueDate", 
	A.equipment_name "equipmentName", 
	A.equipment_recipe_name "equipmentRecipeName", 
	A.area_name "areaName", 
	A.work_order_name "workOrderName", 
	(SELECT 
		work_order_type 
	from 
		work_order w 
	where 
		w.work_order_name = A.work_order_name ) "workOrderType", 
	A.factory_name "factoryName", 
	A.send_factory_name "sendFactoryName", 
	A.event_name "eventName", 
	A.event_user AS "eventUser", 
	A.event_comment "eventComment", 
	A.event_time AS "eventTime", 
	A.product_owner AS "productOwner", 
	A.main_process_flow_name "mainProcessFlowName", 
	A.main_process_flow_version "mainProcessFlowVersion", 
	A.main_process_flow_seq_name "mainProcessFlowSeqName", 
	A.process_flow_name "processFlowName", 
	A.process_flow_version "processFlowVersion", 
	A.process_flow_seq_name "processFlowSeqName", 
	A.process_step_name "processStepName", 
	A.process_step_version "processStepVersion", 
	(
		SELECT process_step_type FROM process_step WHERE process_step_name = A.process_step_name 
		AND (process_step_version = A.process_step_version OR process_step_version = 'AA')
	) as "processStepType", 
	A.ret_process_flow_name "retProcessFlowName", A.ret_process_flow_version "retProcessFlowVersion", 
	A.ret_process_flow_seq_name "retProcessFlowSeqName", A.lot_contamination_level "lotContaminationLevel", 
(case when A.ORIGINAL_LOT_NAME = A.LOT_NAME then (select consumable_name FROM work_order_consumable_history woch where A.lot_name = woch.lot_name) 
else (select consumable_name FROM work_order_consumable_history woch where A.ORIGINAL_LOT_NAME = woch.lot_name) END ) "consumablenName", 
( SELECT label FROM dict_enum_value WHERE enum_type = 'ContaminationLevel' AND enum_value = A.lot_contamination_level || '') AS "contaminationLabel", 
( SELECT pj.PROCESS_JOB_NAME FROM PROCESS_JOB pj JOIN PROCESS_JOB_LOT pjl ON pj.PROCESS_JOB_NAME = pjl.PROCESS_JOB_NAME JOIN LOT l ON l.LOT_NAME = pjl.LOT_NAME 
WHERE pj.process_job_state IN ( 'Created', 'Queued', 'Executing' ) AND l.LOT_NAME =#{lotName}) AS "batchId", ( CASE WHEN e.reticle_group_name IS NOT NULL 
THEN e.reticle_group_name WHEN INSTR( D.reticle_group_name , '$') > 0 
THEN ( SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM PRODUCT_DEF_PF_PARAMETER Z WHERE Z.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME = A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME 
AND PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION = A.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION AND PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME AND PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION 
AND PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME AND PARAMETER_NAME = REPLACE(D.reticle_group_name, '$', '') ) ELSE D.reticle_group_name END ) AS "reticleGroupName", 
( CASE WHEN INSTR( D.probe_card_name , '$') > 0 
THEN ( SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM PRODUCT_DEF_PF_PARAMETER Z WHERE Z.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME = A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME 
AND PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION = A.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION AND PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME 
AND PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION AND PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME AND PARAMETER_NAME = REPLACE(D.probe_card_name, '$', '') ) 
ELSE D.probe_card_name END ) AS "probeCardName", ( CASE WHEN INSTR( D.recipe_name , '$') > 0 THEN ( SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM PRODUCT_DEF_PF_PARAMETER Z 
WHERE Z.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME = A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME AND PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION = A.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION AND PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME 
AND PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION AND PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME AND PARAMETER_NAME = REPLACE(D.recipe_name, '$', '') ) 
ELSE D.recipe_name END ) AS "recipeName", ( SELECT RAW_LOT_NAME FROM product WHERE lot_name = a.lot_name AND rownum = 1) "rawLotName", 
( SELECT carrier_name FROM carrier_slot WHERE MATERIAL_NAME = ( SELECT PRODUCT_NAME FROM product WHERE lot_name = a.lot_name AND rownum = 1)) "carrireName", 
( SELECT carrier_type FROM carrier WHERE carrier_name = ( SELECT carrier_name FROM carrier_slot WHERE MATERIAL_NAME = ( 
SELECT PRODUCT_NAME FROM product WHERE lot_name = a.lot_name AND rownum = 1))) "carrireType", 
( SELECT carrier_def_name FROM carrier WHERE carrier_name = ( SELECT carrier_name FROM carrier_slot 
WHERE MATERIAL_NAME = ( SELECT PRODUCT_NAME FROM product WHERE lot_name = a.lot_name AND rownum = 1))) "carrireDefName", 
( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT lh.EVENT_COMMENT FROM LOT_HISTORY lh WHERE lh.lot_name = a.lot_name 
AND lh.EVENT_COMMENT IS NOT NULL AND ROWNUM = 1 ORDER BY lh.EVENT_TIME DESC )) "lastEventComment", 
A.RELEASE_TIME "releaseTime"FROM ( SELECT A.*, pd.PRODUCTION_TYPE FROM lot A, PRODUCT_DEF pd 
WHERE A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME = pd.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME AND A.lot_name = #{lotName} 
AND ( A.lot_store_state = 'Sending' AND A.send_factory_name = #{factoryName} OR A.lot_store_state != 'Sending' AND A.factory_name = #{factoryName} ) ) A 
LEFT JOIN process_flow_content d ON A.process_flow_name = d.process_flow_name AND A.process_flow_version = d.process_flow_version AND A.process_flow_seq_name = d.process_flow_seq_name 
LEFT JOIN LOT_PROCESS_FLOW_CONTENT e ON e.LOT_NAME = A.LOT_NAME 
AND e.process_flow_name = A.process_flow_name AND e.process_flow_version = A.process_flow_version AND e.process_flow_seq_name = A.process_flow_seq_name

SELECT 
    A.EVENT_TIME AS "eventTime",
    A.LOT_NAME AS "lotName",
    A.PRODUCT_TYPE AS "productType",
    A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME AS "productDefName",
    A.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION AS "productDefVersion",
    A.WORK_ORDER_NAME AS "workOrderName",
    A.ORIGINAL_LOT_NAME AS "originalLotName",
    A.PARENT_LOT_NAME AS "parentLotName",
    A.SOURCE_LOT_NAME AS "sourceLotName",
    A.TARGET_LOT_NAME AS "targetLotName",
    A.LOT_TYPE AS "lotType",
    <choose>
        <when test="_databaseId == 'mysql'">TIME_FORMAT(A.due_date, '%Y-%M-%D')</when>
        <otherwise>TO_CHAR(A.due_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD')</otherwise>
    </choose> AS "dueDate",
    A.LOT_PRIORITY AS "lotPriority",
    A.LOT_STATE AS "lotState",
    A.PRODUCT_QUANTITY AS "productQuantity",
    A.LOT_PROCESS_STATE AS "lotProcessState",
    A.EQUIPMENT_NAME AS "equipmentName",
    A.EQUIPMENT_RECIPE_NAME AS "equipmentRecipeName",
    A.LOT_HOLD_STATE AS "lotHoldState",
    A.LOT_HOLD_COUNT AS "lotHoldCount",
    A.REASON_CODE AS "reasonCode",
    A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME AS "mainProcessFlowName",
    A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION AS "mainProcessFlowVersion",
    A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME AS "mainProcessFlowSeqName",
    A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME AS "processFlowName",
    A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION AS "processFlowVersion",
    A.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME AS "processFlowSeqName",
    A.PROCESS_STEP_NAME AS "processStepName",
    A.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION AS "processStepVersion",
    A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME AS "retProcessFlowName",
    A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION AS "retProcessFlowVersion",
    A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME AS "retProcessFlowSeqName",
    A.AREA_NAME AS "areaName",
    A.RELEASE_TIME AS "releaseTime",
    A.SEND_FACTORY_NAME AS "sendFactoryName",
    A.WAIT_TIME AS "waitTime",
    A.SORTING_ORDER1 AS "sortingOrder1",
    A.SORTING_ORDER2 AS "sortingOrder2",
    A.SORTING_ORDER3 AS "sortingOrder3",
    A.PROCESS_STAGE_NAME AS "processStageName",
    A.PROCESS_GROUP2 AS "processGroup2",
    A.STEP_DESC AS "stepDesc",
    A.PRODUCTION_TYPE AS "productionType",
    A.AGING_PRODUCTION_TYPE AS "agingProductionType",
    (CASE 
        WHEN INSTR(A.DC_SPEC_NAME, '$') > 0 THEN 
            (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE 
             FROM PRODUCT_DEF_PF_PARAMETER Z 
             WHERE Z.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME = A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME 
               AND Z.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION = A.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION 
               AND Z.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME 
               AND Z.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION 
               AND Z.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME 
               AND Z.PARAMETER_NAME = REPLACE(A.DC_SPEC_NAME, '$', ''))
        ELSE A.DC_SPEC_NAME 
    END) AS "dcSpecName",
    (CASE 
        WHEN INSTR(A.RECIPE_NAME, '$') > 0 THEN 
            (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE 
             FROM PRODUCT_DEF_PF_PARAMETER Z 
             WHERE Z.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME = A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME 
               AND Z.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION = A.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION 
               AND Z.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME 
               AND Z.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION 
               AND Z.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME 
               AND Z.PARAMETER_NAME = REPLACE(A.RECIPE_NAME, '$', ''))
        ELSE A.RECIPE_NAME 
    END) AS "recipeName"
FROM (
    SELECT 
        A.EVENT_TIME,
        A.LOT_NAME,
        A.PRODUCT_TYPE,
        A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME,
        A.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION,
        A.WORK_ORDER_NAME,
        A.ORIGINAL_LOT_NAME,
        A.PARENT_LOT_NAME,
        A.SOURCE_LOT_NAME,
        A.TARGET_LOT_NAME,
        A.LOT_TYPE,
        A.AREA_NAME,
        A.RELEASE_TIME,
        A.DUE_DATE,
        A.LOT_PRIORITY,
        A.LOT_STATE,
        A.PRODUCT_QUANTITY,
        A.LOT_PROCESS_STATE,
        A.EQUIPMENT_NAME,
        A.EQUIPMENT_RECIPE_NAME,
        A.LOT_HOLD_STATE,
        A.LOT_HOLD_COUNT,
        A.REASON_CODE,
        A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME,
        A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION,
        A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME,
        A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME,
        A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION,
        A.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME,
        A.PROCESS_STEP_NAME,
        A.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION,
        A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME,
        A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION,
        A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME,
        A.SEND_FACTORY_NAME,
        A.PROCESS_STAGE_NAME,
        A.PROCESS_GROUP2,
        A.DC_SPEC_NAME,
        A.RECIPE_NAME,
        A.RETICLE_GROUP_NAME,
        A.STEP_DESC,
        A.PRODUCTION_TYPE,
        A.AGING_PRODUCTION_TYPE,
        C.SORTING_ORDER AS SORTING_ORDER1,
        D.SORTING_ORDER AS SORTING_ORDER2,
        E.SORTING_ORDER AS SORTING_ORDER3,
        <choose>
            <when test="_databaseId == 'mysql'">TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, A.PROCESS_FLOW_EVENT_TIME, NOW()) AS WAIT_TIME</when>
            <when test="_databaseId == 'postgres'">(DATE_PART('day', NOW()::TIMESTAMP - A.PROCESS_FLOW_EVENT_TIME::TIMESTAMP) * 24 + DATE_PART('hour', NOW()::TIMESTAMP - A.PROCESS_FLOW_EVENT_TIME::TIMESTAMP)) AS WAIT_TIME</when>
            <otherwise>ROUND(TO_NUMBER(CAST(SYSTIMESTAMP AS DATE) - CAST(A.PROCESS_FLOW_EVENT_TIME AS DATE)) * 24) AS WAIT_TIME</otherwise>
        </choose>
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            A.EVENT_TIME,
            A.LOT_NAME,
            A.PRODUCT_TYPE,
            A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME,
            A.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION,
            A.WORK_ORDER_NAME,
            A.ORIGINAL_LOT_NAME,
            A.PARENT_LOT_NAME,
            A.SOURCE_LOT_NAME,
            A.TARGET_LOT_NAME,
            A.LOT_TYPE,
            A.DUE_DATE,
            A.LOT_PRIORITY,
            A.LOT_STATE,
            A.PRODUCT_QUANTITY,
            A.LOT_PROCESS_STATE,
            A.EQUIPMENT_NAME,
            A.EQUIPMENT_RECIPE_NAME,
            A.LOT_HOLD_STATE,
            A.LOT_HOLD_COUNT,
            A.AREA_NAME,
            A.RELEASE_TIME,
            A.SEND_FACTORY_NAME,
            A.REASON_CODE,
            A.PRODUCTION_TYPE,
            A.AGING_PRODUCTION_TYPE,
            A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME,
            A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION,
            A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME,
            A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME,
            A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION,
            A.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME,
            A.PROCESS_STEP_NAME,
            A.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION,
            A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME,
            A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION,
            A.RET_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME,
            A.EVENT_TIME AS PROCESS_FLOW_EVENT_TIME,
            PS.PROCESS_STAGE_NAME,
            PS.PROCESS_GROUP2,
            PS.DESCRIPTION AS STEP_DESC,
            PFC.DC_SPEC_NAME,
            PFC.RECIPE_NAME,
            PFC.RETICLE_GROUP_NAME
        FROM 
             (SELECT DISTINCT  L.*, PD.PRODUCTION_TYPE  FROM LOT L  INNER JOIN WORK_ORDER WO ON L.WORK_ORDER_NAME = WO.WORK_ORDER_NAME
              LEFT JOIN PRODUCT_DEF PD ON L.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME = PD.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME 
              WHERE WO.WORK_ORDER_TYPE LIKE 'MOS%'
             <if test="(_parameter.containsKey('lotName') and lotName != null and lotName != '')">
              AND L.LOT_NAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{lotName}), '%')
             </if>
             ) A
            LEFT JOIN PROCESS_FLOW PF ON PF.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME AND (PF.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION OR (A.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = 'AA' AND PF.PROCESS_FLOW_STATE = 'Active')) 
            LEFT JOIN PROCESS_FLOW_CONTENT PFC ON A.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = PFC.PROCESS_FLOW_NAME AND PF.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = PFC.PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION AND A.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = PFC.PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME 
            LEFT JOIN (
                SELECT DISTINCT PROCESS_STEP_NAME, PROCESS_STAGE_NAME, DESCRIPTION, PROCESS_GROUP2 
                FROM PROCESS_STEP
            ) PS ON PS.PROCESS_STEP_NAME = A.PROCESS_STEP_NAME 
            <where> 
                AND ((A.FACTORY_NAME = #{factoryName} AND A.LOT_STORE_STATE != 'Sending') OR (A.SEND_FACTORY_NAME = #{factoryName} AND A.LOT_STORE_STATE = 'Sending')) 
                AND A.PRODUCT_TYPE LIKE '%_DEVICE' 
                <if test="processGroup2 != null and processGroup2 != ''">AND PS.PROCESS_GROUP2 = #{processGroup2}</if>
                <if test="processStageName != null and processStageName != ''">AND PS.PROCESS_STAGE_NAME = #{processStageName}</if>
                <if test="lotState != null and lotState != ''">AND A.LOT_STATE = #{lotState}</if>
                <if test="areaName != null and areaName != ''">AND A.AREA_NAME = #{areaName}</if>
                <if test="workOrderName != null and workOrderName != ''">AND A.WORK_ORDER_NAME = #{workOrderName}</if>
                <if test="productDefName != null and productDefName != ''">AND A.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME = #{productDefName}</if>
                <if test="lotPriority != null">AND A.LOT_PRIORITY = #{lotPriority}</if>
                <if test="lotType != null and lotType != ''">AND A.LOT_TYPE = #{lotType}</if>
                <if test="lotProcessState != null and lotProcessState != ''">AND A.LOT_PROCESS_STATE = #{lotProcessState}</if>
                <if test="lotHoldState != null and lotHoldState != ''">AND A.LOT_HOLD_STATE = #{lotHoldState}</if>
                <if test="processFlowName != null and processFlowName != ''">AND A.MAIN_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = #{processFlowName}</if>
            </where>
    ) A 
    LEFT JOIN DICT_ENUM_VALUE C ON A.LOT_STATE = C.ENUM_VALUE AND C.ENUM_TYPE = 'LotState' 
    LEFT JOIN DICT_ENUM_VALUE D ON A.LOT_PROCESS_STATE = D.ENUM_VALUE AND D.ENUM_TYPE = 'LotProcessState' 
    LEFT JOIN DICT_ENUM_VALUE E ON A.LOT_HOLD_STATE = E.ENUM_VALUE AND E.ENUM_TYPE = 'LotHoldState'
) A 
ORDER BY 
    SORTING_ORDER1 ASC, 
    SORTING_ORDER2 DESC, 
    SORTING_ORDER3 ASC, 
    <choose>
        <when test="_databaseId == 'mysql'">IF(ISNULL(A.WAIT_TIME), 1, 0), A.WAIT_TIME DESC</when>
        <otherwise>A.WAIT_TIME DESC NULLS LAST</otherwise>
    </choose>, 
    A.LOT_NAME ASC
